104\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   105\u2192\n   106\u2192\t\t\trestConfig.UserAgent = fmt.Sprintf(\"argocd-applicationset-controller/%s (%s)\", vers.Version, vers.Platform)\n   107\u2192\n   108\u2192\t\t\tpolicyObj, exists := utils.Policies[policy]\n   109\u2192\t\t\tif !exists {\n   110\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Error(\"Policy value can be: sync, create-only, create-update, create-delete, default value: sync\")\n   111\u2192\t\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n   112\u2192\t\t\t}\n   113\u2192\n   114\u2192\t\t\t// By default, watch all namespaces\n   115\u2192\t\t\tvar watchedNamespace string = \"\"\n   116\u2192\n   117\u2192\t\t\t// If the applicationset-namespaces contains only one namespace it corresponds to the current namespace\n   118\u2192\t\t\tif len(applicationSetNamespaces) == 1 {\n   119\u2192\t\t\t\twatchedNamespace = (applicationSetNamespaces)[0]\n   120\u2192\t\t\t} else if enableScmProviders && len(allowedScmProviders) == 0 {\n   121\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Error(\"When enabling applicationset in any namespace using applicationset-namespaces, you must either set --enable-scm-providers=false or specify --allowed-scm-providers\")\n   122\u2192\t\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n   123\u2192\t\t\t}\n   124\u2192\n   125\u2192\t\t\tvar cacheOpt ctrlcache.Options\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192\t\t\tif watchedNamespace != \"\" {\n   128\u2192\t\t\t\tcacheOpt = ctrlcache.Options{\n   129\u2192\t\t\t\t\tDefaultNamespaces: map[string]ctrlcache.Config{\n   130\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\twatchedNamespace: {},\n   131\u2192\t\t\t\t\t},\n   132\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   133\u2192\t\t\t}\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192\t\t\tcfg := ctrl.GetConfigOrDie()\n   136\u2192\t\t\terr = appv1alpha1.SetK8SConfigDefaults(cfg)\n   137\u2192\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   138\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Error(err, \"Unable to apply K8s REST config defaults\")\n   139\u2192\t\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n   140\u2192\t\t\t}\n   141\u2192\n   142\u2192\t\t\tmgr, err := ctrl.NewManager(cfg, ctrl.Options{\n   143\u2192\t\t\t\tScheme: scheme,\n   144\u2192\t\t\t\tMetrics: metricsserver.Options{\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\t\tBindAddress: metricsAddr,\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\tCache:                  cacheOpt,\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\tHealthProbeBindAddress: probeBindAddr,\n   149\u2192\t\t\t\tLeaderElection:         enableLeaderElection,\n   150\u2192\t\t\t\tLeaderElectionID:       \"58ac56fa.applicationsets.argoproj.io\",\n   151\u2192\t\t\t\tClient: ctrlclient.Options{\n   152\u2192\t\t\t\t\tDryRun: &dryRun,\n   153\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   154\u2192\t\t\t})\n   155\u2192\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   156\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Error(err, \"unable to start manager\")\n   157\u2192\t\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n   158\u2192\t\t\t}\n   159\u2192\t\t\tdynamicClient, err := dynamic.NewForConfig(mgr.GetConfig())\n   160\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   161\u2192\t\t\tk8sClient, err := kubernetes.NewForConfig(mgr.GetConfig())\n   162\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   163\u2192\n   164\u2192\t\t\targoSettingsMgr := argosettings.NewSettingsManager(ctx, k8sClient, namespace)\n   165\u2192\t\t\tappSetConfig := appclientset.NewForConfigOrDie(mgr.GetConfig())\n   166\u2192\t\t\targoCDDB := db.NewDB(namespace, argoSettingsMgr, k8sClient)\n   167\u2192\n   168\u2192\t\t\tscmConfig := generators.NewSCMConfig(scmRootCAPath, allowedScmProviders, enableScmProviders, github_app.NewAuthCredentials(argoCDDB.(db.RepoCredsDB)))\n   169\u2192\n   170\u2192\t\t\ttlsConfig := apiclient.TLSConfiguration{\n   171\u2192\t\t\t\tDisableTLS:       repoServerPlaintext,\n   172\u2192\t\t\t\tStrictValidation: repoServerStrictTLS,\n   173\u2192\t\t\t}\n   174\u2192\n   175\u2192\t\t\tif !repoServerPlaintext && repoServerStrictTLS {\n   176\u2192\t\t\t\tpool, err := tls.LoadX509CertPool(\n   177\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"%s/reposerver/tls/tls.crt\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath)),\n   178\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"%s/reposerver/tls/ca.crt\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath)),\n   179\u2192\t\t\t\t)\n   180\u2192\t\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   181\u2192\t\t\t\ttlsConfig.Certificates = pool\n   182\u2192\t\t\t}\n   183\u2192\n   184\u2192\t\t\trepoClientset := apiclient.NewRepoServerClientset(argocdRepoServer, repoServerTimeoutSeconds, tlsConfig)\n   185\u2192\t\t\targoCDService, err := services.NewArgoCDService(argoCDDB.GetRepository, gitSubmoduleEnabled, repoClientset, enableNewGitFileGlobbing)\n   186\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   187\u2192\n   188\u2192\t\t\ttopLevelGenerators := generators.GetGenerators(ctx, mgr.GetClient(), k8sClient, namespace, argoCDService, dynamicClient, scmConfig)\n   189\u2192\n   190\u2192\t\t\t// start a webhook server that listens to incoming webhook payloads\n   191\u2192\t\t\twebhookHandler, err := webhook.NewWebhookHandler(namespace, webhookParallelism, argoSettingsMgr, mgr.GetClient(), topLevelGenerators)\n   192\u2192\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   193\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Error(err, \"failed to create webhook handler\")\n   194\u2192\t\t\t}\n   195\u2192\t\t\tif webhookHandler != nil {\n   196\u2192\t\t\t\tstartWebhookServer(webhookHandler, webhookAddr)\n   197\u2192\t\t\t}\n   198\u2192\n   199\u2192\t\t\tmetrics := appsetmetrics.NewApplicationsetMetrics(\n   200\u2192\t\t\t\tutils.NewAppsetLister(mgr.GetClient()),\n   201\u2192\t\t\t\tmetricsAplicationsetLabels,\n   202\u2192\t\t\t\tfunc(appset *appv1alpha1.ApplicationSet) bool {\n   203\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn utils.IsNamespaceAllowed(applicationSetNamespaces, appset.Namespace)\n   204\u2192\t\t\t\t})\n   205\u2192\n   206\u2192\t\t\tif err = (&controllers.ApplicationSetReconciler{\n   207\u2192\t\t\t\tGenerators:                 topLevelGenerators,\n   208\u2192\t\t\t\tClient:                     mgr.GetClient(),\n   209\u2192\t\t\t\tScheme:                     mgr.GetScheme(),\n   210\u2192\t\t\t\tRecorder:                   mgr.GetEventRecorderFor(\"applicationset-controller\"),\n   211\u2192\t\t\t\tRenderer:                   &utils.Render{},\n   212\u2192\t\t\t\tPolicy:                     policyObj,\n   213\u2192\t\t\t\tEnablePolicyOverride:       enablePolicyOverride,\n   214\u2192\t\t\t\tArgoAppClientset:           appSetConfig,\n   215\u2192\t\t\t\tKubeClientset:              k8sClient,\n   216\u2192\t\t\t\tArgoDB:                     argoCDDB,\n   217\u2192\t\t\t\tArgoCDNamespace:            namespace,\n   218\u2192\t\t\t\tApplicationSetNamespaces:   applicationSetNamespaces,\n   219\u2192\t\t\t\tEnableProgressiveSyncs:     enableProgressiveSyncs,\n   220\u2192\t\t\t\tSCMRootCAPath:              scmRootCAPath,\n   221\u2192\t\t\t\tGlobalPreservedAnnotations: globalPreservedAnnotations,\n   222\u2192\t\t\t\tGlobalPreservedLabels:      globalPreservedLabels,\n   223\u2192\t\t\t\tMetrics:                    &metrics,\n   224\u2192\t\t\t}).SetupWithManager(mgr, enableProgressiveSyncs, maxConcurrentReconciliations); err != nil {\n   225\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Error(err, \"unable to create controller\", \"controller\", \"ApplicationSet\")\n   226\u2192\t\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n   227\u2192\t\t\t}\n   228\u2192\n   229\u2192\t\t\tstats.StartStatsTicker(10 * time.Minute)\n   230\u2192\t\t\tlog.Info(\"Starting manager\")\n   231\u2192\t\t\tif err := mgr.Start(ctrl.SetupSignalHandler()); err != nil {\n   232\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Error(err, \"problem running manager\")\n   233\u2192\t\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n   234\u2192\t\t\t}\n   235\u2192\t\t\treturn nil\n   236\u2192\t\t},\n   237\u2192\t}\n   238\u2192\tclientConfig = cli.AddKubectlFlagsToCmd(&command)\n   239\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&metricsAddr, \"metrics-addr\", \":8080\", \"The address the metric endpoint binds to.\")\n   240\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&probeBindAddr, \"probe-addr\", \":8081\", \"The address the probe endpoint binds to.\")\n   241\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&webhookAddr, \"webhook-addr\", \":7000\", \"The address the webhook endpoint binds to.\")\n   242\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enableLeaderElection, \"enable-leader-election\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_ENABLE_LEADER_ELECTION\", false),\n   243\u2192\t\t\"Enable leader election for controller manager. \"+\n   244\u2192\t\t\t\"Enabling this will ensure there is only one active controller manager.\")\n   245\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&applicationSetNamespaces, \"applicationset-namespaces\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_NAMESPACES\", []string{}, \",\"), \"Argo CD applicationset namespaces\")\n   246\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&argocdRepoServer, \"argocd-repo-server\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_REPO_SERVER\", common.DefaultRepoServerAddr), \"Argo CD repo server address\")\n   247\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&policy, \"policy\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_POLICY\", \"\"), \"Modify how application is synced between the generator and the cluster. Default is '' (empty), which means AppSets default to 'sync', but they may override that default. Setting an explicit value prevents AppSet-level overrides, unless --allow-policy-override is enabled. Explicit options are: 'sync' (create & update & delete), 'create-only', 'create-update' (no deletion), 'create-delete' (no update)\")\n   248\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enablePolicyOverride, \"enable-policy-override\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_ENABLE_POLICY_OVERRIDE\", policy == \"\"), \"For security reason if 'policy' is set, it is not possible to override it at applicationSet level. 'allow-policy-override' allows user to define their own policy\")\n   249\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&debugLog, \"debug\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_DEBUG\", false), \"Print debug logs. Takes precedence over loglevel\")\n   250\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&cmdutil.LogFormat, \"logformat\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_LOGFORMAT\", \"text\"), \"Set the logging format. One of: text|json\")\n   251\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&cmdutil.LogLevel, \"loglevel\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_LOGLEVEL\", \"info\"), \"Set the logging level. One of: debug|info|warn|error\")\n   252\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&allowedScmProviders, \"allowed-scm-providers\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_ALLOWED_SCM_PROVIDERS\", []string{}, \",\"), \"The list of allowed custom SCM provider API URLs. This restriction does not apply to SCM or PR generators which do not accept a custom API URL. (Default: Empty = all)\")\n   253\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enableScmProviders, \"enable-scm-providers\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_ENABLE_SCM_PROVIDERS\", true), \"Enable retrieving information from SCM providers, used by the SCM and PR generators (Default: true)\")\n   254\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&dryRun, \"dry-run\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_DRY_RUN\", false), \"Enable dry run mode\")\n   255\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enableProgressiveSyncs, \"enable-progressive-syncs\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_ENABLE_PROGRESSIVE_SYNCS\", false), \"Enable use of the experimental progressive syncs feature.\")\n   256\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enableNewGitFileGlobbing, \"enable-new-git-file-globbing\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_ENABLE_NEW_GIT_FILE_GLOBBING\", false), \"Enable new globbing in Git files generator.\")\n   257\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&repoServerPlaintext, \"repo-server-plaintext\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_REPO_SERVER_PLAINTEXT\", false), \"Disable TLS on connections to repo server\")\n   258\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&repoServerStrictTLS, \"repo-server-strict-tls\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_REPO_SERVER_STRICT_TLS\", false), \"Whether to use strict validation of the TLS cert presented by the repo server\")\n   259\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&repoServerTimeoutSeconds, \"repo-server-timeout-seconds\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_REPO_SERVER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS\", 60, 0, math.MaxInt64), \"Repo server RPC call timeout seconds.\")\n   260\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&maxConcurrentReconciliations, \"concurrent-reconciliations\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_CONCURRENT_RECONCILIATIONS\", 10, 1, 100), \"Max concurrent reconciliations limit for the controller\")\n   261\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&scmRootCAPath, \"scm-root-ca-path\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_SCM_ROOT_CA_PATH\", \"\"), \"Provide Root CA Path for self-signed TLS Certificates\")\n   262\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&globalPreservedAnnotations, \"preserved-annotations\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_GLOBAL_PRESERVED_ANNOTATIONS\", []string{}, \",\"), \"Sets global preserved field values for annotations\")\n   263\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&globalPreservedLabels, \"preserved-labels\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_GLOBAL_PRESERVED_LABELS\", []string{}, \",\"), \"Sets global preserved field values for labels\")\n   264\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&webhookParallelism, \"webhook-parallelism-limit\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_WEBHOOK_PARALLELISM_LIMIT\", 50, 1, 1000), \"Number of webhook requests processed concurrently\")\n   265\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&metricsAplicationsetLabels, \"metrics-applicationset-labels\", []string{}, \"List of Application labels that will be added to the argocd_applicationset_labels metric\")\n   266\u2192\treturn &command\n   267\u2192}\n   268\u2192\n   269\u2192func startWebhookServer(webhookHandler *webhook.WebhookHandler, webhookAddr string) {\n   270\u2192\tmux := http.NewServeMux()\n   271\u2192\tmux.HandleFunc(\"/api/webhook\", webhookHandler.Handler)\n   272\u2192\tgo func() {\n   273\u2192\t\tlog.Infof(\"Starting webhook server %s\", webhookAddr)\n   274\u2192\t\terr := http.ListenAndServe(webhookAddr, mux)\n   275\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   276\u2192\t\t\tlog.Error(err, \"failed to start webhook server\")\n   277\u2192\t\t\tos.Exit(1)\n   278\u2192\t\t}\n   279\u2192\t}()\n   280\u2192}\n   281\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. val != \"\" {\n    32\u2192\t\tbinaryName = val\n    33\u2192\t}\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192\tisCLI := false\n    36\u2192\tswitch binaryName {\n    37\u2192\tcase \"argocd\", \"argocd-linux-amd64\", \"argocd-darwin-amd64\", \"argocd-windows-amd64.exe\":\n    38\u2192\t\tcommand = cli.NewCommand()\n    39\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    40\u2192\tcase \"argocd-server\":\n    41\u2192\t\tcommand = apiserver.NewCommand()\n    42\u2192\tcase \"argocd-application-controller\":\n    43\u2192\t\tcommand = appcontroller.NewCommand()\n    44\u2192\tcase \"argocd-repo-server\":\n    45\u2192\t\tcommand = reposerver.NewCommand()\n    46\u2192\tcase \"argocd-cmp-server\":\n    47\u2192\t\tcommand = cmpserver.NewCommand()\n    48\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    49\u2192\tcase \"argocd-dex\":\n    50\u2192\t\tcommand = dex.NewCommand()\n    51\u2192\tcase \"argocd-notifications\":\n    52\u2192\t\tcommand = notification.NewCommand()\n    53\u2192\tcase \"argocd-git-ask-pass\":\n    54\u2192\t\tcommand = gitaskpass.NewCommand()\n    55\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    56\u2192\tcase \"argocd-applicationset-controller\":\n    57\u2192\t\tcommand = applicationset.NewCommand()\n    58\u2192\tcase \"argocd-k8s-auth\":\n    59\u2192\t\tcommand = k8sauth.NewCommand()\n    60\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    61\u2192\tdefault:\n    62\u2192\t\tcommand = cli.NewCommand()\n    63\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    64\u2192\t}\n    65\u2192\tutil.SetAutoMaxProcs(isCLI)\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192\tif err := command.Execute(); err != nil {\n    68\u2192\t\tos.Exit(1)\n    69\u2192\t}\n    70\u2192}\n    71\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. revision.\n    86\u2192\tCompareWithLatest CompareWith = 2\n    87\u2192\t// Compare live application state against state defined using revision of most recent comparison.\n    88\u2192\tCompareWithRecent CompareWith = 1\n    89\u2192\t// Skip comparison and only refresh application resources tree\n    90\u2192\tComparisonWithNothing CompareWith = 0\n    91\u2192)\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192func (a CompareWith) Max(b CompareWith) CompareWith {\n    94\u2192\treturn CompareWith(math.Max(float64(a), float64(b)))\n    95\u2192}\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192func (a CompareWith) Pointer() *CompareWith {\n    98\u2192\treturn &a\n    99\u2192}\n   100\u2192\n   101\u2192func getAppLog(app *appv1.Application) *log.Entry {\n   102\u2192\treturn log.WithFields(log.Fields{\n   103\u2192\t\t\"application\":        app.Name,\n   104\u2192\t\t\"app-namespace\":      app.Namespace,\n   105\u2192\t\t\"app-qualified-name\": app.QualifiedName(),\n   106\u2192\t\t\"project\":            app.Spec.Project,\n   107\u2192\t})\n   108\u2192}\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192// ApplicationController is the controller for application resources.\n   111\u2192type ApplicationController struct {\n   112\u2192\tcache                *appstatecache.Cache\n   113\u2192\tnamespace            string\n   114\u2192\tkubeClientset queue contains app namespace/name\n   119\u2192\tappRefreshQueue workqueue.TypedRateLimitingInterface[string]\n   120\u2192\t// queue contains app namespace/name/comparisonType and used to request app refresh with the predefined comparison type\n   121\u2192\tappComparisonTypeRefreshQueue workqueue.TypedRateLimitingInterface[string]\n   122\u2192\tappOperationQueue 130\u2192\tstatusHardRefreshTimeout      time.Duration\n   131\u2192\tstatusRefreshJitter           time.Duration\n   132\u2192\tselfHealTimeout               time.Duration\n   133\u2192\tselfHealBackOff               *wait.Backoff\n   134\u2192\trepoClientset                 apiclient.Clientset\n   135\u2192\tdb                            db.ArgoDB\n   136\u2192\tsettingsMgr                   *settings_util.SettingsManager\n   137\u2192\trefreshRequestedApps          map[string]CompareWith\n   138\u2192\trefreshRequestedAppsMutex     *sync.Mutex\n kubectlParallelismLimit > 0 {\n   214\u2192\t\tctrl.kubectlSemaphore = semaphore.NewWeighted(kubectlParallelismLimit)\n   215\u2192\t}\n   216\u2192\tkubectl.SetOnKubectlRun(ctrl.onKubectlRun)\n   217\u2192\tappInformer, appLister := ctrl.newApplicationInformerAndLister()\n   218\u2192\tindexers := cache.Indexers{cache.NamespaceIndex: cache.MetaNamespaceIndexFunc}\n   219\u2192\tprojInformer := v1alpha1.NewAppProjectInformer(applicationClientset, namespace, appResyncPeriod, indexers)\n   220\u2192\tvar err error\n   221\u2192\t_, err = projInformer.AddEventHandler(cache.ResourceEventHandlerFuncs{\n   222\u2192\t\tAddFunc: func(obj interface{}) {\n   223\u2192\t\t\tif key, err := cache.MetaNamespaceKeyFunc(obj); err == nil {\n   224\u2192\t\t\t\tctrl.projectRefreshQueue.AddRateLimited(key)\n   225\u2192\t\t\t\tif projMeta, ok := obj.(metav1.Object); ok {\n   226\u2192\t\t\t\t\tctrl.InvalidateProjectsCache(projMeta.GetName())\n   227\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   228\u2192\t\t\t}\n   229\u2192\t\t},\n   230\u2192\t\tUpdateFunc: func(old, new interface{}) {\n   231\u2192\t\t\tif key, err := cache.MetaNamespaceKeyFunc(new); err == nil {\n   232\u2192\t\t\t\tctrl.projectRefreshQueue.AddRateLimited(key)\n   233\u2192\t\t\t\tif projMeta, ok := new.(metav1.Object); ok {\n   234\u2192\t\t\t\t\tctrl.InvalidateProjectsCache(projMeta.GetName())\n   235\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   236\u2192\t\t\t}\n   237\u2192\t\t},\n   238\u2192\t\tDeleteFunc: func(obj interface{}) {\n   239\u2192\t\t\tif key, err := cache.DeletionHandlingMetaNamespaceKeyFunc(obj); err == nil {\n   240\u2192\t\t\t\t// immediately push to queue for deletes\n   241\u2192\t\t\t\tctrl.projectRefreshQueue.Add(key)\n   242\u2192\t\t\t\tif projMeta, ok := obj.(metav1.Object); ok {\n   243\u2192\t\t\t\t\tctrl.InvalidateProjectsCache(projMeta.GetName())\n   244\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   245\u2192\t\t\t}\n   246\u2192\t\t},\n   247\u2192\t})\n   248\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   249\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   250\u2192\t}\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192\tfactory := informers.NewSharedInformerFactoryWithOptions(ctrl.kubeClientset, defaultDeploymentInformerResyncDuration, informers.WithNamespace(settingsMgr.GetNamespace()))\n   253\u2192\n   254\u2192\tvar deploymentInformer informerv1.DeploymentInformer\n   255\u2192\n   256\u2192\t// only initialize deployment informer if dynamic distribution is enabled\n   257\u2192\tif dynamicClusterDistributionEnabled {\n   258\u2192\t\tdeploymentInformer = factory.Apps().V1().Deployments()\n   259\u2192\t}\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192\treadinessHealthCheck := func(r *http.Request) error {\n   262\u2192\t\tif dynamicClusterDistributionEnabled {\n   263\u2192\t\t\tapplicationControllerName := env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppControllerName, common.DefaultApplicationControllerName)\n   264\u2192\t\t\tappControllerDeployment, err := deploymentInformer.Lister().Deployments(settingsMgr.GetNamespace()).Get(applicationControllerName)\n   265\u2192\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   266\u2192\t\t\t\tif kubeerrors.IsNotFound(err) {\n   267\u2192\t\t\t\t\tappControllerDeployment = nil\n   268\u2192\t\t\t\t} else {\n   269\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"error retrieving Application Controller Deployment: %w\", err)\n   270\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   271\u2192\t\t\t}\n   272\u2192\t\t\tif appControllerDeployment != nil {\n   273\u2192\t\t\t\tif appControllerDeployment.Spec.Replicas != nil && int(*appControllerDeployment.Spec.Replicas) <= 0 {\n   274\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"application controller deployment replicas is not set or is less than 0, replicas: %d\", appControllerDeployment.Spec.Replicas)\n   275\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   276\u2192\t\t\t\tshard := env.ParseNumFromEnv(common.EnvControllerShard, -1, -math.MaxInt32, math.MaxInt32)\n   277\u2192\t\t\t\tif _, err := sharding.GetOrUpdateShardFromConfigMap(kubeClientset.(*kubernetes.Clientset), settingsMgr, int(*appControllerDeployment.Spec.Replicas), shard); err != nil {\n   278\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"error while updating the heartbeat for to the Shard Mapping ConfigMap: %w\", err)\n   279\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   280\u2192\t\t\t}\n   281\u2192\t\t}\n   282\u2192\t\treturn nil\n   283\u2192\t}\n   284\u2192\n   285\u2192\tmetricsAddr := fmt.Sprintf(\"0.0.0.0:%d\", metricsPort)\n   286\u2192\n   287\u2192\tctrl.metricsServer, err = metrics.NewMetricsServer(metricsAddr, appLister, ctrl.canProcessApp, readinessHealthCheck, metricsApplicationLabels, metricsApplicationConditions)\n   288\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   289\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   290\u2192\t}\n   291\u2192\tif metricsCacheExpiration.Seconds() != 0 {\n   292\u2192\t\terr = ctrl.metricsServer.SetExpiration(metricsCacheExpiration)\n   293\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n   294\u2192\t\t\treturn nil, err\n   295\u2192\t\t}\n   296\u2192\t}\n   297\u2192\tstateCache := statecache.NewLiveStateCache(db, appInformer, ctrl.settingsMgr, kubectl, ctrl.metricsServer, ctrl.handleObjectUpdated, clusterSharding, argo.NewResourceTracking())\n   298\u2192\tappStateManager := NewAppStateManager(db, applicationClientset, repoClientset, namespace, kubectl, ctrl.settingsMgr, stateCache, projInformer, ctrl.metricsServer, argoCache, ctrl.statusRefreshTimeout, argo.NewResourceTracking(), persistResourceHealth, repoErrorGracePeriod, serverSideDiff, ignoreNormalizerOpts)\n   299\u2192\tctrl.appInformer = appInformer\n   300\u2192\tctrl.appLister = appLister\n   301\u2192\tctrl.projInformer = projInformer\n   302\u2192\tctrl.deploymentInformer = deploymentInformer\n   303\u2192\tctrl.appStateManager = appStateManager\n   304\u2192\tctrl.stateCache = stateCache\n   305\u2192\n   306\u2192\treturn &ctrl, nil\n   307\u2192}\n   308\u2192\n   309\u2192func (ctrl *ApplicationController) InvalidateProjectsCache(names ...string) {\n   310\u2192\tif len(names) > 0 {\n   311\u2192\t\tfor _, name := range names {\n   312\u2192\t\t\tctrl.projByNameCache.Delete(name)\n   313\u2192\t\t}\n   314\u2192\t} else if ctrl != nil {\n   315\u2192\t\tctrl.projByNameCache.Range(func(key, _ interface{}) bool {\n   316\u2192\t\t\tctrl.projByNameCache.Delete(key)\n   317\u2192\t\t\treturn true\n   318\u2192\t\t})\n   319\u2192\t}\n   320\u2192}\n   321\u2192\n   322\u2192func (ctrl *ApplicationController) GetMetricsServer() *metrics.MetricsServer {\n   323\u2192\treturn ctrl.metricsServer\n   324\u2192}\n   325\u2192\n   326\u2192func (ctrl *ApplicationController) onKubectlRun(command string) (kube.CleanupFunc, error) {\n   327\u2192\tctrl.metricsServer.IncKubectlExec(command)\n   328\u2192\tif ctrl.kubectlSemaphore != nil {\n   329\u2192\t\tif err := ctrl.kubectlSemaphore.Acquire(context.Background(), 1); err != nil {\n   330\u2192\t\t\treturn nil, err\n   331\u2192\t\t}\n   332\u2192\t\tctrl.metricsServer.IncKubectlExecPending(command)\n   333\u2192\t}\n   334\u2192\treturn func() {\n   335\u2192\t\tif ctrl.kubectlSemaphore != nil {\n   336\u2192\t\t\tctrl.kubectlSemaphore.Release(1)\n   337\u2192\t\t\tctrl.metricsServer.DecKubectlExecPending(command)\n   338\u2192\t\t}\n   339\u2192\t}, nil\n   340\u2192}\n   341\u2192\n   342\u2192func isSelfReferencedApp(app *appv1.Application, ref v1.ObjectReference) bool {\n   343\u2192\tgvk := ref.GroupVersionKind()\n   344\u2192\treturn ref.UID == app.UID &&\n   345\u2192\t\tref.Name == app.Name &&\n   346\u2192\t\tref.Namespace == app.Namespace &&\n   347\u2192\t\tgvk.Group == application.Group &&\n   348\u2192\t\tgvk.Kind == application.ApplicationKind\n   349\u2192}\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should 875\u2192\tgo func() { errors.CheckError(ctrl.metricsServer.ListenAndServe()) }()\n   876\u2192\n   877\u2192\tfor i := 0; i < statusProcessors; i++ {\n   878\u2192\t\tgo wait.Until(func() {\n <namespace>/<name>.\n   905\u2192func (ctrl *ApplicationController) requestAppRefresh(appName string, compareWith *CompareWith, after *time.Duration) {\n   906\u2192\tkey := ctrl.toAppKey(appName)\n 257\u2192\tdefaultProj := &v1alpha1.AppProject{\n   258\u2192\t\tObjectMeta: metav1.ObjectMeta{Name: v1alpha1.DefaultAppProjectName, Namespace: opts.Namespace},\n   259\u2192\t\tSpec: v1alpha1.AppProjectSpec{\n   260\u2192\t\t\tSourceRepos:              []string{\"*\"},\n   261\u2192\t\t\tDestinations:             []v1alpha1.ApplicationDestination{{Server: \"*\", Namespace: \"*\"}},\n   262\u2192\t\t\tClusterResourceWhitelist: []metav1.GroupKind{{Group: \"*\", Kind: \"*\"}},\n   263\u2192\t\t},\n   264\u2192\t}\n   265\u2192\n   266\u2192\t_, err := opts.AppClientset.ArgoprojV1alpha1().AppProjects(opts.Namespace).Get(context.Background(), defaultProj.Name, metav1.GetOptions{})\n   267\u2192\tif apierrors.IsNotFound(err) {\n   268\u2192\t\t_, err = opts.AppClientset.ArgoprojV1alpha1().AppProjects(opts.Namespace).Create(context.Background(), defaultProj, metav1.CreateOptions{})\n   269\u2192\t\tif apierrors.IsAlreadyExists(err) {\n   270\u2192\t\t\treturn nil\n   271\u2192\t\t}\n   272\u2192\t}\n   273\u2192\treturn err\n   274\u2192}\n   275\u2192\n   276\u2192// NewServer returns a new instance of the Argo CD API server\n   277\u2192func NewServer(ctx context.Context, opts ArgoCDServerOpts, appsetOpts ApplicationSetOpts) *ArgoCDServer {\n   278\u2192\tsettingsMgr := settings_util.NewSettingsManager(ctx, opts.KubeClientset, opts.Namespace)\n   279\u2192\tsettings, err := settingsMgr.InitializeSettings(opts.Insecure)\n   280\u2192\terrorsutil.CheckError(err)\n   281\u2192\terr = initializeDefaultProject(opts)\n   282\u2192\terrorsutil.CheckError(err)\n   283\u2192\n   284\u2192\tappInformerNs := opts.Namespace\n   285\u2192\tif len(opts.ApplicationNamespaces) > 0 {\n   286\u2192\t\tappInformerNs = \"\"\n   287\u2192\t}\n   288\u2192\tprojFactory := appinformer.NewSharedInformerFactoryWithOptions(opts.AppClientset, 0, appinformer.WithNamespace(opts.Namespace), appinformer.WithTweakListOptions(func(options *metav1.ListOptions) {}))\n   289\u2192\tappFactory := appinformer.NewSharedInformerFactoryWithOptions(opts.AppClientset, 0, appinformer.WithNamespace(appInformerNs), appinformer.WithTweakListOptions(func(options *metav1.ListOptions) {}))\n   290\u2192\n   291\u2192\tprojInformer := projFactory.Argoproj().V1alpha1().AppProjects().Informer()\n   292\u2192\tprojLister := projFactory.Argoproj().V1alpha1().AppProjects().Lister().AppProjects(opts.Namespace)\n   293\u2192\n   294\u2192\tappInformer := appFactory.Argoproj().V1alpha1().Applications().Informer()\n   295\u2192\tappLister := appFactory.Argoproj().V1alpha1().Applications().Lister()\n   296\u2192\n   297\u2192\tappsetInformer := appFactory.Argoproj().V1alpha1().ApplicationSets().Informer()\n   298\u2192\tappsetLister := appFactory.Argoproj().V1alpha1().ApplicationSets().Lister()\n   299\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. "   464\u2192func (a *ArgoCDServer) Listen() (*Listeners, error) {\n   465\u2192\tmainLn, err := startListener(a.ListenHost, a.ListenPort)\n   466\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   467\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   468\u2192\t}\n   469\u2192\tmetricsLn, err := startListener(a.ListenHost, a.MetricsPort)\n   470\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   471\u2192\t\tio.Close(mainLn)\n   472\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   473\u2192\t}\n   474\u2192\tvar dOpts []grpc.DialOption\n   475\u2192\tdOpts = append(dOpts, grpc.WithDefaultCallOptions(grpc.MaxCallRecvMsgSize(apiclient.MaxGRPCMessageSize)))\n   476\u2192\tdOpts = append(dOpts, grpc.WithUserAgent(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s\", common.ArgoCDUserAgentName, common.GetVersion().Version)))\n   477\u2192\tdOpts = append(dOpts, grpc.WithUnaryInterceptor(grpc_util.OTELUnaryClientInterceptor()))\n   478\u2192\tdOpts = append(dOpts, grpc.WithStreamInterceptor(grpc_util.OTELStreamClientInterceptor()))\n   479\u2192\tif a.useTLS() {\n   480\u2192\t\t// The following sets up the dial Options for grpc-gateway to talk to gRPC server over TLS.\n   481\u2192\t\t// grpc-gateway is just translating HTTP/HTTPS requests as gRPC requests over localhost,\n   482\u2192\t\t// so we need to supply the same certificates to establish the connections that a normal,\n   483\u2192\t\t// external gRPC client would need.\n   484\u2192\t\ttlsConfig := a.settings.TLSConfig()\n   485\u2192\t\tif a.TLSConfigCustomizer != nil {\n   486\u2192\t\t\ta.TLSConfigCustomizer(tlsConfig)\n   487\u2192\t\t}\n   488\u2192\t\ttlsConfig.InsecureSkipVerify = true\n   489\u2192\t\tdCreds := credentials.NewTLS(tlsConfig)\n   490\u2192\t\tdOpts = append(dOpts, grpc.WithTransportCredentials(dCreds))\n   491\u2192\t} else {\n   492\u2192\t\tdOpts = append(dOpts, grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()))\n   493\u2192\t}\n   494\u2192\t// nolint:staticcheck\n   495\u2192\tconn, err := grpc.Dial(fmt.Sprintf(\"localhost:%d\", a.ListenPort), dOpts...)\n   496\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   497\u2192\t\tio.Close(mainLn)\n   498\u2192\t\tio.Close(metricsLn)\n   499\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   500\u2192\t}\n   501\u2192\treturn &Listeners{Main: mainLn, Metrics: metricsLn, GatewayConn: conn}, nil\n   502\u2192}\n   503\u2192\n   504\u2192// Init starts informers used by the API server\n   505\u2192func (a *ArgoCDServer) Init(ctx context.Context) {\n   506\u2192\tgo a.projInformer.Run(ctx.Done())\n   507\u2192\tgo a.appInformer.Run(ctx.Done())\n   508\u2192\tgo a.appsetInformer.Run(ctx.Done())\n   509\u2192\tgo a.configMapInformer.Run(ctx.Done())\n   510\u2192\tgo a.secretInformer.Run(ctx.Done())\n   511\u2192}\n   512\u2192\n   513\u2192// Run runs the API Server\n   514\u2192// We use k8s.io/code-generator/cmd/go-to-protobuf to generate the .proto files from the API types.\n   515\u2192// k8s.io/ go-to-protobuf uses protoc-gen-gogo, which comes from gogo/protobuf (a fork of\n   516\u2192// golang/protobuf).\n   517\u2192func (a *ArgoCDServer) Run(ctx context.Context, listeners *Listeners) {\n   518\u2192\ta.userStateStorage.Init(ctx)\n   519\u2192\n   520\u2192\tmetricsServ := metrics.NewMetricsServer(a.MetricsHost, a.MetricsPort)\n   521\u2192\tif a.RedisClient != nil {\n   522\u2192\t\tcacheutil.CollectMetrics(a.RedisClient, metricsServ)\n   523\u2192\t}\n   524\u2192\n   525\u2192\tsvcSet := newArgoCDServiceSet(a)\n   526\u2192\ta.serviceSet = svcSet\n   527\u2192\tgrpcS, appResourceTreeFn := a.newGRPCServer()\n   528\u2192\tgrpcWebS := grpcweb.WrapServer(grpcS)\n   529\u2192\tvar httpS *http.Server\n   530\u2192\tvar httpsS *http.Server\n   531\u2192\tif a.useTLS() {\n   532\u2192\t\thttpS = newRedirectServer(a.ListenPort, a.RootPath)\n   533\u2192\t\thttpsS = a.newHTTPServer(ctx, a.ListenPort, grpcWebS, appResourceTreeFn, listeners.GatewayConn, metricsServ)\n   534\u2192\t} else {\n   535\u2192\t\thttpS = a.newHTTPServer(ctx, a.ListenPort, grpcWebS, appResourceTreeFn, listeners.GatewayConn, metricsServ)\n   536\u2192\t}\n   537\u2192\tif a.RootPath != \"\" {\n   538\u2192\t\thttpS.Handler = withRootPath(httpS.Handler, a)\n   539\u2192\n   540\u2192\t\tif httpsS != nil {\n   541\u2192\t\t\thttpsS.Handler = withRootPath(httpsS.Handler, a)\n   542\u2192\t\t}\n   543\u2192\t}\n   544\u2192\thttpS.Handler = &bug21955Workaround{handler: httpS.Handler}\n   545\u2192\tif httpsS != nil {\n   546\u2192\t\thttpsS.Handler = &bug21955Workaround{handler: httpsS.Handler}\n   547\u2192\t}\n   548\u2192\n   549\u2192\t// CMux is used to support servicing gRPC and HTTP1.1+JSON on the same port\n   550\u2192\ttcpm := cmux.New(listeners.Main)\n   551\u2192\tvar tlsm cmux.CMux\n   552\u2192\tvar grpcL net.Listener\n   553\u2192\tvar httpL net.Listener\n   554\u2192\tvar httpsL net.Listener\n   555\u2192\tif !a.useTLS() {\n   556\u2192\t\thttpL = tcpm.Match(cmux.HTTP1Fast(\"PATCH\"))\n   557\u2192\t\tgrpcL = tcpm.MatchWithWriters(cmux.HTTP2MatchHeaderFieldSendSettings(\"content-type\", \"application/grpc\"))\n   558\u2192\t} else {\n   559\u2192\t\t// We first match on HTTP 1.1 methods.\n   560\u2192\t\thttpL = tcpm.Match(cmux.HTTP1Fast(\"PATCH\"))\n   561\u2192\n   562\u2192\t\t// If not matched, we assume that its TLS.\n   563\u2192\t\ttlsl := tcpm.Match(cmux.Any())\n   564\u2192\t\ttlsConfig := tls.Config{}\n   565\u2192\t\ttlsConfig.GetCertificate = func(info *tls.ClientHelloInfo) (*tls.Certificate, error) {\n   566\u2192\t\t\treturn a.settings.Certificate, nil\n   567\u2192\t\t}\n   568\u2192\t\tif a.TLSConfigCustomizer != nil {\n   569\u2192\t\t\ta.TLSConfigCustomizer(&tlsConfig)\n   570\u2192\t\t}\n   571\u2192\t\ttlsl = tls.NewListener(tlsl, &tlsConfig)\n   572\u2192\n   573\u2192\t\t// Now, we build another mux recursively to match HTTPS and gRPC.\n   574\u2192\t\ttlsm = cmux.New(tlsl)\n   575\u2192\t\thttpsL = tlsm.Match(cmux.HTTP1Fast(\"PATCH\"))\n   576\u2192\t\tgrpcL = tlsm.MatchWithWriters(cmux.HTTP2MatchHeaderFieldSendSettings(\"content-type\", \"application/grpc\"))\n   577\u2192\t}\n   578\u2192\n   579\u2192\t// Start the muxed listeners for our servers\n   580\u2192\tlog.Infof(\"argocd %s serving on port %d (url: %s, tls: %v, namespace: %s, sso: %v)\",\n   581\u2192\t\tcommon.GetVersion(), a.ListenPort, a.settings.URL, a.useTLS(), a.Namespace, a.settings.IsSSOConfigured())\n   582\u2192\tlog.Infof(\"Enabled application namespace patterns: %s\", a.allowedApplicationNamespacesAsString())\n   583\u2192\n   584\u2192\tgo func() { a.checkServeErr(\"grpcS\", grpcS.Serve(grpcL)) }()\n   585\u2192\tgo func() { a.checkServeErr(\"httpS\", httpS.Serve(httpL)) }()\n   586\u2192\tif a.useTLS() {\n   587\u2192\t\tgo func() { a.checkServeErr(\"httpsS\", httpsS.Serve(httpsL)) }()\n   588\u2192\t\tgo func() { a.checkServeErr(\"tlsm\", tlsm.Serve()) }()\n   589\u2192\t}\n   590\u2192\tgo a.watchSettings()\n   591\u2192\tgo a.rbacPolicyLoader(ctx)\n   592\u2192\tgo func() { a.checkServeErr(\"tcpm\", tcpm.Serve()) }()\n   593\u2192\tgo func() { a.checkServeErr(\"metrics\", metricsServ.Serve(listeners.Metrics)) }()\n   594\u2192\tif !cache.WaitForCacheSync(ctx.Done(), a.projInformer.HasSynced, a.appInformer.HasSynced) {\n   595\u2192\t\tlog.Fatal(\"Timed out waiting for project cache to sync\")\n   596\u2192\t}\n   597\u2192\n   598\u2192\ta.stopCh = make(chan struct{})\n   599\u2192\t<-a.stopCh\n   600\u2192}\n   601\u2192\n   602\u2192func (a *ArgoCDServer) Initialized() bool {\n   603\u2192\treturn a.projInformer.HasSynced() && a.appInformer.HasSynced()\n   604\u2192}\n   605\u2192\n   606\u2192// checkServeErr checks the error from a .Serve() call to decide if it was a graceful shutdown\n   607\u2192func (a *ArgoCDServer) checkServeErr(name string, err error) {\n   608\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   609\u2192\t\tif a.stopCh == nil {\n   610\u2192\t\t\t// a nil stopCh indicates a graceful shutdown\n   611\u2192\t\t\tlog.Infof(\"graceful shutdown %s: %v\", name, err)\n   612\u2192\t\t} else {\n   613\u2192\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"%s: %v\", name, err)\n   614\u2192\t\t}\n   615\u2192\t} else {\n   616\u2192\t\tlog.Infof(\"graceful shutdown %s\", name)\n   617\u2192\t}\n   618\u2192}\n   619\u2192\n   620\u2192// Shutdown stops the Argo CD server\n   621\u2192func (a *ArgoCDServer) Shutdown() {\n   622\u2192\tlog.Info(\"Shut down requested\")\n   623\u2192\tstopCh := a.stopCh\n   624\u2192\ta.stopCh = nil\n   625\u2192\tif stopCh != nil {\n   626\u2192\t\tclose(stopCh)\n   627\u2192\t}\n   628\u2192}\n   629\u2192\n   630\u2192func checkOIDCConfigChange(currentOIDCConfig *settings_util.OIDCConfig, newArgoCDSettings *settings_util.ArgoCDSettings) bool {\n   631\u2192\tnewOIDCConfig := newArgoCDSettings.OIDCConfig()\n   632\u2192\n   633\u2192\tif (currentOIDCConfig != nil && newOIDCConfig == nil) || (currentOIDCConfig == nil && newOIDCConfig != nil) {\n   634\u2192\t\treturn true\n   635\u2192\t}\n   636\u2192\n   637\u2192\tif currentOIDCConfig != nil && newOIDCConfig != nil {\n   638\u2192\t\tif !reflect.DeepEqual(*currentOIDCConfig, *newOIDCConfig) {\n   639\u2192\t\t\treturn true\n   640\u2192\t\t}\n   641\u2192\t}\n   642\u2192\n   643\u2192\treturn false\n   644\u2192}\n   645\u2192\n   646\u2192// watchSettings watches the configmap and secret for any setting updates that would warrant a\n   647\u2192// restart of the API server.\n   648\u2192func (a *ArgoCDServer) watchSettings() {\n   649\u2192\tupdateCh := make(chan *settings_util.ArgoCDSettings, 1)\n   650\u2192\ta.settingsMgr.Subscribe(updateCh)\n   651\u2192\n   652\u2192\tprevURL := a.settings.URL\n   653\u2192\tprevAdditionalURLs := a.settings.AdditionalURLs\n   654\u2192\tprevOIDCConfig := a.settings.OIDCConfig()\n   655\u2192\tprevDexCfgBytes, err := dexutil.GenerateDexConfigYAML(a.settings, a.DexTLSConfig == nil || a.DexTLSConfig.DisableTLS)\n   656\u2192\terrorsutil.CheckError(err)\n   657\u2192\tprevGitHubSecret := a.settings.WebhookGitHubSecret\n   658\u2192\tprevGitLabSecret := a.settings.WebhookGitLabSecret\n   659\u2192\tprevBitbucketUUID := a.settings.WebhookBitbucketUUID\n   660\u2192\tprevBitbucketServerSecret := a.settings.WebhookBitbucketServerSecret\n   661\u2192\tprevGogsSecret := a.settings.WebhookGogsSecret\n   662\u2192\tprevExtConfig := a.settings.ExtensionConfig\n   663\u2192\tvar prevCert, prevCertKey string\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. 12\u2192\tgrpc_logrus \"github.com/grpc-ecosystem/go-grpc-middleware/logging/logrus\"\n    13\u2192\tgrpc_prometheus \"github.com/grpc-ecosystem/go-grpc-prometheus\"\n    14\u2192\tlog 22\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/common\"\n    23\u2192\tversionpkg \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/pkg/apiclient/version\"\n    24\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/reposerver/apiclient\"\n    25\u2192\treposervercache \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/reposerver/cache\"\n 28\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/server/version\"\n    29\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/argo\"\n    30\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/env\"\n    31\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/git\"\n    32\u2192\tgrpc_util \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/grpc\"\n    33\u2192\ttlsutil \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/tls\"\n    34\u2192)\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192// ArgoCDRepoServer is the repo server implementation\n    37\u2192type ArgoCDRepoServer struct {\n    38\u2192\tlog           *log.Entry\n    39\u2192\trepoService   *repository.Service\n    40\u2192\tmetricsServer *metrics.MetricsServer\n    41\u2192\tgitCredsStore git.CredsStore\n    42\u2192\tcache         *reposervercache.Cache\n    43\u2192\topts          []grpc.ServerOption\n    44\u2192\tinitConstants repository.RepoServerInitConstants\n    45\u2192}\n    46\u2192\n    47\u2192// The hostnames to generate self-signed issues with\n    48\u2192var tlsHostList []string = []string{\"localhost\", \"reposerver\"}\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192// NewServer returns a new instance of the Argo CD Repo server\n    51\u2192func NewServer(metricsServer *metrics.MetricsServer, cache *reposervercache.Cache, tlsConfCustomizer tlsutil.ConfigCustomizer, initConstants repository.RepoServerInitConstants, gitCredsStore git.CredsStore) (*ArgoCDRepoServer, error) {\n    52\u2192\tvar tlsConfig *tls.Config\n    53\u2192\n    54\u2192\t// Generate or load TLS server certificates to use with this instance of\n    55\u2192\t// repository server.\n    56\u2192\tif tlsConfCustomizer != nil {\n    57\u2192\t\tvar err error\n    58\u2192\t\tcertPath := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/reposerver/tls/tls.crt\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath))\n    59\u2192\t\tkeyPath := fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/reposerver/tls/tls.key\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath))\n    60\u2192\t\ttlsConfig, err = tlsutil.CreateServerTLSConfig(certPath, keyPath, tlsHostList)\n    61\u2192\t\tif err != nil {\n    62\u2192\t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"error creating server TLS config: %w\", err)\n    63\u2192\t\t}\n    64\u2192\t\ttlsConfCustomizer(tlsConfig)\n    65\u2192\t}\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192\tif os.Getenv(common.EnvEnableGRPCTimeHistogramEnv) == \"true\" {\n    68\u2192\t\tgrpc_prometheus.EnableHandlingTimeHistogram()\n    69\u2192\t}\n    70\u2192\n    71\u2192\tserverLog := log.NewEntry(log.StandardLogger())\n    72\u2192\tstreamInterceptors := []grpc.StreamServerInterceptor{\n    73\u2192\t\totelgrpc.StreamServerInterceptor(), //nolint:staticcheck // TODO: ignore SA1019 for depreciation: see https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/18258\n    74\u2192\t\tgrpc_logrus.StreamServerInterceptor(serverLog),\n    75\u2192\t\tgrpc_prometheus.StreamServerInterceptor,\n    76\u2192\t\tgrpc_util.PanicLoggerStreamServerInterceptor(serverLog),\n    77\u2192\t}\n    78\u2192\tunaryInterceptors := []grpc.UnaryServerInterceptor{\n    79\u2192\t\totelgrpc.UnaryServerInterceptor(), //nolint:staticcheck // TODO: ignore SA1019 for depreciation: see https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/18258\n    80\u2192\t\tgrpc_logrus.UnaryServerInterceptor(serverLog),\n    81\u2192\t\tgrpc_prometheus.UnaryServerInterceptor,\n    82\u2192\t\tgrpc_util.PanicLoggerUnaryServerInterceptor(serverLog),\n    83\u2192\t\tgrpc_util.ErrorSanitizerUnaryServerInterceptor(),\n    84\u2192\t}\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192\tserverOpts := []grpc.ServerOption{\n    87\u2192\t\tgrpc.UnaryInterceptor(grpc_middleware.ChainUnaryServer(unaryInterceptors...)),\n    88\u2192\t\tgrpc.StreamInterceptor(grpc_middleware.ChainStreamServer(streamInterceptors...)),\n    89\u2192\t\tgrpc.MaxRecvMsgSize(apiclient.MaxGRPCMessageSize),\n    90\u2192\t\tgrpc.MaxSendMsgSize(apiclient.MaxGRPCMessageSize),\n    91\u2192\t\tgrpc.KeepaliveEnforcementPolicy(\n    92\u2192\t\t\tkeepalive.EnforcementPolicy{\n    93\u2192\t\t\t\tMinTime: common.GetGRPCKeepAliveEnforcementMinimum(),\n    94\u2192\t\t\t},\n    95\u2192\t\t),\n    96\u2192\t}\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192\t// We do allow for non-TLS servers to be created, in case of mTLS will be\n    99\u2192\t// implemented by e.g. a sidecar container.\n   100\u2192\tif tlsConfig != nil {\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. "   100\u2192\tif tlsConfig != nil {\n   101\u2192\t\tserverOpts = append(serverOpts, grpc.Creds(credentials.NewTLS(tlsConfig)))\n   102\u2192\t}\n   103\u2192\trepoService := repository.NewService(metricsServer, cache, initConstants, argo.NewResourceTracking(), gitCredsStore, filepath.Join(os.TempDir(), \"_argocd-repo\"))\n   104\u2192\tif err := repoService.Init(); err != nil {\n   105\u2192\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to initialize the repo service: %w\", err)\n   106\u2192\t}\n   107\u2192\n   108\u2192\treturn &ArgoCDRepoServer{\n   109\u2192\t\tlog:           serverLog,\n   110\u2192\t\tmetricsServer: metricsServer,\n   111\u2192\t\tcache:         cache,\n   112\u2192\t\tinitConstants: initConstants,\n   113\u2192\t\topts:          serverOpts,\n   114\u2192\t\tgitCredsStore: gitCredsStore,\n   115\u2192\t\trepoService:   repoService,\n   116\u2192\t}, nil\n   117\u2192}\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192// CreateGRPC creates new configured grpc server\n   120\u2192func (a *ArgoCDRepoServer) CreateGRPC() *grpc.Server {\n   121\u2192\tserver := grpc.NewServer(a.opts...)\n   122\u2192\tversionpkg.RegisterVersionServiceServer(server, version.NewServer(nil, func() (bool, error) {\n   123\u2192\t\treturn true, nil\n   124\u2192\t}))\n   125\u2192\tapiclient.RegisterRepoServerServiceServer(server, a.repoService)\n   126\u2192\n   127\u2192\thealthService := health.NewServer()\n   128\u2192\tgrpc_health_v1.RegisterHealthServer(server, healthService)\n   129\u2192\n   130\u2192\t// Register reflection service on gRPC server.\n   131\u2192\treflection.Register(server)\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192\treturn server\n   134\u2192}\n   135\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
52. Bash @ -

}

(\n    63\u2192\t// Rather than importing the whole argocd-notifications controller, just copying the const here\n    64\u2192\t//   https://github.com/argoproj-labs/argocd-notifications/blob/33d345fa838829bb50fca5c08523aba380d2c12b/pkg/controller/subscriptions.go#L12\n    65\u2192\t// \"notified.notifications.argoproj.io\"\n    67\u2192\tReconcileRequeueOnValidationError = time.Minute * 3\n    68\u2192)\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192var defaultPreservedAnnotations = []string{\n    71\u2192\tNotifiedAnnotationKey,\n    72\u2192\targov1alpha1.AnnotationKeyRefresh,\n    73\u2192}\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192// ApplicationSetReconciler reconciles a ApplicationSet object\n    76\u2192type ApplicationSetReconciler struct {\n    77\u2192\tclient.Client\n    78\u2192\tScheme               *runtime.Scheme\n    79\u2192\tRecorder             record.EventRecorder\n    80\u2192\tGenerators           map[string]generators.Generator\n    81\u2192\tArgoDB               db.ArgoDB\n    82\u2192\tArgoAppClientset     appclientset.Interface\n    83\u2192\tKubeClientset        kubernetes.Interface\n    84\u2192\tPolicy               argov1alpha1.ApplicationsSyncPolicy\n    85\u2192\tEnablePolicyOverride bool\n    86\u2192\tutils.Renderer\n    87\u2192\tArgoCDNamespace            string\n    88\u2192\tApplicationSetNamespaces   []string\n    89\u2192\tEnableProgressiveSyncs     bool\n    90\u2192\tSCMRootCAPath              string\n    91\u2192\tGlobalPreservedAnnotations []string\n    92\u2192\tGlobalPreservedLabels      []string\n    93\u2192\tMetrics                    *metrics.ApplicationsetMetrics\n    94\u2192}\n    95\u2192\n    96\u2192// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=argoproj.io,resources=applicationsets,verbs=get;list;watch;create;update;patch;delete\n    97\u2192// +kubebuilder:rbac:groups=argoproj.io,resources=applicationsets/status,verbs=get;update;patch\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192func (r *ApplicationSetReconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {\n   100\u2192\tlogCtx := log.WithField(\"applicationset\", req.NamespacedName)\n   101\u2192\n   102\u2192\tvar applicationSetInfo argov1alpha1.ApplicationSet\n   103\u2192\tparametersGenerated := false\n   104\u2192\tstartTime := time.Now()\n   105\u2192\tif err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, &applicationSetInfo); err != nil {\n   106\u2192\t\tif client.IgnoreNotFound(err) != nil {\n   107\u2192\t\t\tlogCtx.WithError(err).Infof(\"unable to get ApplicationSet: '%v' \", err)\n   108\u2192\t\t}\n   109\u2192\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, client.IgnoreNotFound(err)\n   110\u2192\t}\n   111\u2192\n   112\u2192\tdefer func() {\n   113\u2192\t\tr.Metrics.ObserveReconcile(&applicationSetInfo, time.Since(startTime))\n   114\u2192\t}()\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192\t// Do not attempt to further reconcile the ApplicationSet if it is being deleted.\n   117\u2192\tif applicationSetInfo.ObjectMeta.DeletionTimestamp != nil {\n   118\u2192\t\tappsetName := applicationSetInfo.ObjectMeta.Name\n   119\u2192\t\tlogCtx.Debugf(\"DeletionTimestamp is set on %s\", appsetName)\n   120\u2192\t\tdeleteAllowed := utils.DefaultPolicy(applicationSetInfo.Spec.SyncPolicy, r.Policy, r.EnablePolicyOverride).AllowDelete()\n   121\u2192\t\tif !deleteAllowed {\n   122\u2192\t\t\tlogCtx.Debugf(\"ApplicationSet policy does not allow to delete\")\n   123\u2192\t\t\tif err := r.removeOwnerReferencesOnDeleteAppSet(ctx, applicationSetInfo); err != nil {\n   124\u2192\t\t\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, err\n   125\u2192\t\t\t}\n   126\u2192\t\t\tlogCtx.Debugf(\"ownerReferences referring %s is deleted from generated applications\", appsetName)\n   127\u2192\t\t}\n   128\u2192\t\tcontrollerutil.RemoveFinalizer(&applicationSetInfo, argov1alpha1.ResourcesFinalizerName)\n   129\u2192\t\tif err := r.Update(ctx, &applicationSetInfo); err != nil {\n   130\u2192\t\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, err\n   131\u2192\t\t}\n   132\u2192\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, nil\n   133\u2192\t}\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192\tif err := r.migrateStatus(ctx, &applicationSetInfo); err != nil {\n   136\u2192\t\tlogCtx.Errorf(\"failed to migrate status subresource %v\", err)\n   137\u2192\t\treturn ctrl.Result{}, err\n   138\u2192\t}\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192\t// Log a warning if there are unrecognized generators\n   141\u2192\t_ = utils.CheckInvalidGenerators(&applicationSetInfo)\n   142\u2192\t// desiredApplications is the main list of all expected Applications from all generators in this appset.\n   143\u2192\tdesiredApplications, applicationSetReason, err := template.GenerateApplications(logCtx, applicationSetInfo, r.Generators, r.Renderer, r.Client)\n   144\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   145\u2192\t\t_ = r.setApplicationSetStatusCondition(ctx,\n   146\u2192\t\t\t&applicationSetInfo,\n   147\u2192\t\t\targov1alpha1.ApplicationSetCondition{\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\tType:    argov1alpha1.ApplicationSetConditionErrorOccurred,\n   149\u2192\t\t\t\tMessage: err.Error(),\n   150\u2192\t\t\t\tReason:  string(applicationSetReason),\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
56. Task @ -
Input
{
  "description": "Investigate configuration loading pipeline",
  "prompt": "Investigate how Argo CD components load configuration:\n1. What libraries are used for CLI flags parsing? (Look for cobra, pflag, viper)\n2. Where are the main configuration structs defined? (e.g., ArgoCD settings, server config)\n3. How are ConfigMaps and Secrets loaded from Kubernetes?\n4. Where are environment variable and config file handling implemented?\n5. Look at the Settings/ArgoCD ConfigMap handling\n6. Find examples in argocd-server, application-controller, and repo-server\n\nSearch in /workspace/cmd/, /workspace/server/, /workspace/util/config/ and related areas.",
  "subagent_type": "Explore"
}
Output
{
  "agentId": "a1b283293e0819f9f",
  "content": [
    {
      "text": "Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive report:\n\n## Argo CD Configuration Loading Investigation Report\n\nBased on my thorough investigation of the Argo CD v2.13.2 codebase, here's a comprehensive analysis of how configuration is loaded:\n\n---\n\n### **1. CLI FLAGS PARSING LIBRARIES**\n\n**Library:** **Cobra** and **pflag**\n- **Location:** `/workspace/cmd/main.go` and component-specific command files\n- **Pattern:** All Argo CD components use **Cobra** for CLI command structure and **pflag** for flag management\n- **Not Used:** Viper is NOT used for configuration management in the main components\n- **Examples:**\n  - `/workspace/cmd/argocd-server/commands/argocd_server.go` (line 16): `\"github.com/spf13/cobra\"`\n  - `/workspace/util/cli/cli.go` (line 20): `\"github.com/spf13/pflag\"`\n\n**Flag Binding Mechanism:**\n- Flags are bound to command structures using `command.Flags().StringVar()`, `IntVar()`, `BoolVar()`, etc.\n- Environment variables are used as defaults via the `env.*` utility functions\n- Example: Line 281 in argocd_server.go: `command.Flags().BoolVar(&insecure, \"insecure\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_INSECURE\", false), \"...\")`\n\n---\n\n### **2. CONFIGURATION STRUCT DEFINITIONS**\n\n**Main Configuration Structures:**\n\n#### **ArgoCDSettings** \n- **Location:** `/workspace/util/settings/settings.go` (lines 48-132)\n- **Purpose:** Holds in-memory runtime configuration for the entire Argo CD cluster\n- **Key Fields:**\n  - `URL` - external URL for SSO/webhook callbacks\n  - `DexConfig`, `OIDCConfigRAW` - authentication configuration\n  - `ServerSignature` - JWT token signing key\n  - `Certificate` - TLS certificate for API server\n  - `Secrets` - map of all secrets for reference resolution\n  - Various webhook secrets (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, etc.)\n  - UI settings (banner content, CSS URL, exec enabled)\n  - Resource customization and tracking settings\n  - `KustomizeBuildOptions` - Kustomize build parameters\n\n#### **SettingsManager**\n- **Location:** `/workspace/util/settings/settings.go` (lines 551-567)\n- **Purpose:** Kubernetes-aware manager for loading/persisting configuration\n- **Key Members:**\n  - `clientset` - Kubernetes client for accessing ConfigMaps/Secrets\n  - `secrets` - lister for Kubernetes Secrets\n  - `secretsInformer` - shared informer for watching Secret changes\n  - `configmaps` - lister for Kubernetes ConfigMaps\n  - `namespace` - Argo CD namespace\n  - `subscribers` - channels notified of configuration changes\n\n**Constructor:**\n```go\nfunc NewSettingsManager(ctx context.Context, clientset kubernetes.Interface, namespace string, opts ...SettingsManagerOpts) *SettingsManager\n// Location: Line 1801 in settings.go\n```\n\n---\n\n### **3. CONFIGMAP AND SECRET LOADING FROM KUBERNETES**\n\n**Three-Layer Configuration Loading:**\n\n#### **Layer 1: ConfigMap (`argocd-cm`)**\n- **Name Constant:** `ArgoCDConfigMapName = \"argocd-cm\"` (common.go:37)\n- **Loaded in:** `GetSettings()` \u2192 `updateSettingsFromConfigMap()` (lines 1319-1542)\n- **Key Configuration Keys in ConfigMap:**\n  - `dex.config` - Dex OIDC provider configuration\n  - `oidc.config` - External OIDC configuration\n  - `repositories` - Git repository credentials list\n  - `repository.credentials` - Repository credential templates\n  - `helm.repositories` - Helm chart repository credentials\n  - `resource.customizations.*` - Resource health/actions/ignore rules\n  - `kustomize.buildOptions` - Default Kustomize build options\n  - `kustomize.version.*` - Custom Kustomize versions\n  - `kustomize.path.*` - Kustomize binary paths\n  - `url` - External URL\n  - `ui.cssurl`, `ui.bannercontent`, `ui.bannerurl` - UI customization\n  - `users.anonymous.enabled` - Anonymous user setting\n  - `users.session.duration` - User session timeout\n  - `application.instanceLabelKey` - Custom app instance label\n  - `application.resourceTrackingMethod` - Resource tracking method\n  - `application.sync.impersonation.enabled` - Sync impersonation feature\n  - `exec.enabled`, `exec.shells` - Terminal exec settings\n  - `status.badge.enabled` - Status badge feature flag\n\n#### **Layer 2: Secret (`argocd-secret`)**\n- **Name Constant:** `ArgoCDSecretName = \"argocd-secret\"` (common.go:38)\n- **Loaded in:** `updateSettingsFromSecret()` (lines 1571-1628)\n- **Key Secret Fields:**\n  - `server.secretkey` - Server signature for JWT signing\n  - `tls.crt`, `tls.key` - TLS certificate/private key (optional, can be externalized)\n  - `webhook.github.secret` - GitHub webhook secret\n  - `webhook.gitlab.secret` - GitLab webhook secret\n  - `webhook.bitbucket.uuid` - Bitbucket webhook UUID\n  - `webhook.bitbucketserver.secret` - Bitbucket Server webhook secret\n  - `webhook.gogs.secret` - Gogs webhook secret\n  - `webhook.azuredevops.username`, `webhook.azuredevops.password` - Azure DevOps credentials\n\n#### **Layer 3: External TLS Secret (`argocd-server-tls`)**\n- **Name Constant:** `externalServerTLSSecretName = \"argocd-server-tls\"` (line 503)\n- **Loaded in:** `externalServerTLSCertificate()` (lines 1633-1650)\n- **Purpose:** Optional external management of server TLS certificate\n- **Fields:** `tls.crt`, `tls.key`\n\n**Kubernetes Informer Pattern:**\n- **Location:** `initialize()` method (lines 1362-1451)\n- Uses **shared informers** to watch for ConfigMap/Secret changes with a 3-minute resync period\n- Automatically invalidates cache and notifies subscribers on updates\n- Label selector: `app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argocd`\n\n---\n\n### **4. ENVIRONMENT VARIABLE AND CONFIG FILE HANDLING**\n\n**Environment Variable Utilities:**\n- **Location:** `/workspace/util/env/env.go`\n- **Functions:**\n  - `ParseNumFromEnv()` - Parse integers with min/max bounds\n  - `ParseInt64FromEnv()` - Parse int64 with bounds\n  - `ParseBoolFromEnv()` - Parse boolean (case-insensitive)\n  - `ParseDurationFromEnv()` - Parse time durations\n  - `StringFromEnv()` - Get string with default\n  - `StringsFromEnv()` - Parse comma-separated strings\n  - `ParseStringToStringFromEnv()` - Parse key=value pairs\n  - `ParseFloatFromEnv()` - Parse floats\n\n**ARGOCD_OPTS Parsing:**\n- **Location:** `/workspace/util/config/env.go`\n- Parses `ARGOCD_OPTS` environment variable for additional CLI-like options\n- Uses shellquote for parsing quoted arguments\n- Supports both `--key value` and `--key=value` formats\n\n**Standard Environment Variables for Components:**\n- `ARGOCD_SERVER_INSECURE` - Disable TLS\n- `ARGOCD_SERVER_LISTEN_ADDRESS`, `ARGOCD_SERVER_REPO_SERVER`, etc.\n- `ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_*` - Controller-specific settings\n- `ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_*` - Repo server settings\n- `ARGOCD_LOG_FORMAT`, `ARGOCD_LOG_LEVEL` - Logging\n- `ARGOCD_APP_CONF_PATH` - Configuration path override (default: `/app/config`)\n\n**Config File Paths:**\n- TLS certificates: `/app/config/[component]/tls/` (with fallback to argocd-secret)\n- SSH known hosts: `/app/config/ssh/ssh_known_hosts`\n- GPG keys: `/app/config/gpg/keys`\n\n---\n\n### **5. SETTINGS/ARGOCD CONFIGMAP HANDLING**\n\n**Complete Configuration Flow:**\n\n```\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502                     Component Startup                               \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                              \u2502\n                              \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502   1. Parse CLI Flags (Cobra + pflag)                                \u2502\n\u2502      - Environment variables as defaults                            \u2502\n\u2502      - Examples: --insecure, --port, --repo-server                  \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                              \u2502\n                              \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502   2. Create Kubernetes Client & SettingsManager                     \u2502\n\u2502      - Initialize informers for ConfigMaps/Secrets                  \u2502\n\u2502      - Start watching for changes                                   \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                              \u2502\n                              \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502   3. Load Configuration via GetSettings()                           \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Read argocd-cm ConfigMap                                    \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Read argocd-secret Secret                                   \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Read external argocd-server-tls Secret (if exists)          \u2502\n\u2502      \u2514\u2500 Unmarshal YAML/JSON values into ArgoCDSettings              \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                              \u2502\n                              \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502   4. Notify Subscribers of Configuration Changes                    \u2502\n\u2502      - Real-time updates on ConfigMap/Secret modifications          \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n```\n\n**Key Configuration Keys (Constants):**\n- Location: Lines 401-535 in `/workspace/util/settings/settings.go`\n- Examples:\n  - `settingDexConfigKey = \"dex.config\"`\n  - `settingsOIDCConfigKey = \"oidc.config\"`\n  - `repositoriesKey = \"repositories\"`\n  - `resourceCustomizationsKey = \"resource.customizations\"`\n  - `kustomizeBuildOptionsKey = \"kustomize.buildOptions\"`\n\n---\n\n### **6. EXAMPLES IN COMPONENT STARTUP**\n\n#### **argocd-server**\n- **File:** `/workspace/cmd/argocd-server/commands/argocd_server.go`\n- **Key Points:**\n  - Lines 280-327: Flag definitions with environment variable defaults\n  - Line 157: Creates SettingsManager\n  - Line 251: Initializes server with all configuration\n  - Uses flags like `--insecure`, `--port`, `--basehref`, `--repo-server`, `--dex-server`\n\n#### **argocd-application-controller**\n- **File:** `/workspace/cmd/argocd-application-controller/commands/argocd_application_controller.go`\n- **Key Points:**\n  - Lines 234-276: Extensive flag definitions\n  - Line 157: Creates SettingsManager for cluster/repo change detection\n  - Uses cache sources and TLS configuration\n  - Supports workqueue rate limiting configuration\n\n#### **argocd-repo-server**\n- **File:** `/workspace/cmd/argocd-repo-server/commands/argocd_repo_server.go`\n- **Key Points:**\n  - Lines 223-244: Flag definitions for repo server\n  - Supports parallelism limits, manifest size constraints, GPG configuration\n  - No SettingsManager dependency (stateless service)\n\n---\n\n### **7. CONFIGURATION UPDATE MECHANISM**\n\n**Hot-Reload Capability:**\n- **Mechanism:** Kubernetes informers watch for ConfigMap/Secret updates\n- **Event Handlers:** ResourceEventHandlerFuncs for Add/Update/Delete events\n- **Cache Invalidation:** `invalidateCache()` clears repository and credential caches\n- **Subscriber Notification:** All registered subscribers are notified via channels\n- **Location:** Lines 1368-1450 in settings.go\n\n**Update Methods:**\n- `updateConfigMap()` - Write changes back to argocd-cm\n- `updateSecret()` - Write changes back to argocd-secret\n- `SaveSettings()`, `SaveRepositories()`, `SaveRepositoryCredentials()` - High-level save methods\n\n---\n\n### **8. SUMMARY TABLE**\n\n| Aspect | Library/Location | Details |\n|--------|-----------------|---------|\n| **CLI Flag Parsing** | Cobra + pflag | `/workspace/util/cli/cli.go` |\n| **Main Config Struct** | ArgoCDSettings | `/workspace/util/settings/settings.go:48-132` |\n| **Config Manager** | SettingsManager | `/workspace/util/settings/settings.go:551-567` |\n| **ConfigMap Name** | `argocd-cm` | `/workspace/common/common.go:37` |\n| **Secret Name** | `argocd-secret` | `/workspace/common/common.go:38` |\n| **Env Var Parsing** | util/env package | `/workspace/util/env/env.go` |\n| **Config Loading** | GetSettings() | `/workspace/util/settings/settings.go:1319` |\n| **Watch Mechanism** | K8s Informers | `/workspace/util/settings/settings.go:1362` |\n| **TLS Config** | Various TLS loaders | `/workspace/util/tls/` |\n| **OPTS Parsing** | shellquote | `/workspace/util/config/env.go` |\n\n---\n\nThis comprehensive investigation shows that Argo CD uses a sophisticated, Kubernetes-native configuration system with:\n1. CLI flags parsed by Cobra/pflag\n2. Environment variables for defaults\n3. Kubernetes ConfigMaps/Secrets as the primary configuration store\n4. Hot-reload via shared informers and subscriber notifications\n5. Multi-layer configuration (ConfigMap, Secret, external TLS Secret)",
      "type": "text"
    }
  ],

Where are the main configuration structs defined? (e.g., ArgoCD settings, server config)\n3. How are ConfigMaps and Secrets loaded from Kubernetes?\n4. Where are environment variable and config file handling implemented?\n5. Look at the Settings/ArgoCD ConfigMap handling\n6. Find examples in argocd-server, application-controller, and repo-server\n\nSearch in /workspace/cmd/, /workspace/server/, /workspace/util/config/ and related areas.",

val != \"\" {\n    32\u2192\t\tbinaryName = val\n    33\u2192\t}\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192\tisCLI := false\n    36\u2192\tswitch binaryName {\n    37\u2192\tcase \"argocd\", \"argocd-linux-amd64\", \"argocd-darwin-amd64\", \"argocd-windows-amd64.exe\":\n    38\u2192\t\tcommand = cli.NewCommand()\n    39\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    40\u2192\tcase \"argocd-server\":\n    41\u2192\t\tcommand = apiserver.NewCommand()\n    42\u2192\tcase \"argocd-application-controller\":\n    43\u2192\t\tcommand = appcontroller.NewCommand()\n    44\u2192\tcase \"argocd-repo-server\":\n    45\u2192\t\tcommand = reposerver.NewCommand()\n    46\u2192\tcase \"argocd-cmp-server\":\n    47\u2192\t\tcommand = cmpserver.NewCommand()\n    48\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    49\u2192\tcase \"argocd-dex\":\n    50\u2192\t\tcommand = dex.NewCommand()\n    51\u2192\tcase \"argocd-notifications\":\n    52\u2192\t\tcommand = notification.NewCommand()\n    53\u2192\tcase \"argocd-git-ask-pass\":\n    54\u2192\t\tcommand = gitaskpass.NewCommand()\n    55\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    56\u2192\tcase \"argocd-applicationset-controller\":\n    57\u2192\t\tcommand = applicationset.NewCommand()\n    58\u2192\tcase \"argocd-k8s-auth\":\n    59\u2192\t\tcommand = k8sauth.NewCommand()\n    60\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    61\u2192\tdefault:\n    62\u2192\t\tcommand = cli.NewCommand()\n    63\u2192\t\tisCLI = true\n    64\u2192\t}\n    65\u2192\tutil.SetAutoMaxProcs(isCLI)\n    66\u2192\n    67\u2192\tif err := command.Execute(); err != nil {\n    68\u2192\t\tos.Exit(1)\n    69\u2192\t}\n    70\u2192}\n    71\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"     1\u2192package config\n     2\u2192\n     3\u2192import (\n     4\u2192\t\"encoding/json\"\n     5\u2192\t\"io\"\n     6\u2192\t\"net/http\"\n     7\u2192\t\"os\"\n     8\u2192\n     9\u2192\t\"sigs.k8s.io/yaml\"\n    10\u2192)\n    11\u2192\n    12\u2192// UnmarshalReader is used to read manifests from stdin\n    13\u2192func UnmarshalReader(reader io.Reader, obj interface{}) error {\n    14\u2192\tdata, err := io.ReadAll(reader)\n    15\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    16\u2192\t\treturn err\n    17\u2192\t}\n    18\u2192\treturn unmarshalObject(data, obj)\n    19\u2192}\n    20\u2192\n    21\u2192// unmarshalObject tries to convert a YAML or JSON byte array into the provided type.\n    22\u2192func unmarshalObject(data []byte, obj interface{}) error {\n    23\u2192\t// first, try unmarshaling as JSON\n    24\u2192\t// Based on technique from Kubectl, which supports both YAML and JSON:\n    25\u2192\t//   https://mlafeldt.github.io/blog/teaching-go-programs-to-love-json-and-yaml/\n    26\u2192\t//   http://ghodss.com/2014/the-right-way-to-handle-yaml-in-golang/\n    27\u2192\t// Short version: JSON unmarshaling won't zero out null fields; YAML unmarshaling will.\n    28\u2192\t// This may have unintended effects or hard-to-catch issues when populating our application object.\n    29\u2192\tjsonData, err := yaml.YAMLToJSON(data)\n    30\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    31\u2192\t\treturn err\n    32\u2192\t}\n    33\u2192\treturn json.Unmarshal(jsonData, &obj)\n    34\u2192}\n    35\u2192\n    36\u2192// MarshalLocalYAMLFile writes JSON or YAML to a file on disk.\n    37\u2192// The caller is responsible for checking error return values.\n    38\u2192func MarshalLocalYAMLFile(path string, obj interface{}) error {\n    39\u2192\tyamlData, err := yaml.Marshal(obj)\n    40\u2192\tif err == nil {\n    41\u2192\t\terr = os.WriteFile(path, yamlData, 0o600)\n    42\u2192\t}\n    43\u2192\treturn err\n    44\u2192}\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192// UnmarshalLocalFile retrieves JSON or YAML from a file on disk.\n    47\u2192// The caller is responsible for checking error return values.\n    48\u2192func UnmarshalLocalFile(path string, obj interface{}) error {\n    49\u2192\tdata, err := os.ReadFile(path)\n    50\u2192\tif err == nil {\n    51\u2192\t\terr = unmarshalObject(data, obj)\n    52\u2192\t}\n    53\u2192\treturn err\n    54\u2192}\n    55\u2192\n    56\u2192func Unmarshal(data []byte, obj interface{}) error {\n    57\u2192\treturn unmarshalObject(data, obj)\n    58\u2192}\n    59\u2192\n    60\u2192// UnmarshalRemoteFile retrieves JSON or YAML through a GET request.\n    61\u2192// The caller is responsible for checking error return values.\n    62\u2192func UnmarshalRemoteFile(url string, obj interface{}) error {\n    63\u2192\tdata, err := ReadRemoteFile(url)\n    64\u2192\tif err == nil {\n    65\u2192\t\terr = unmarshalObject(data, obj)\n    66\u2192\t}\n    67\u2192\treturn err\n    68\u2192}\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192// ReadRemoteFile issues a GET request to retrieve the contents of the specified URL as a byte array.\n    71\u2192// The caller is responsible for checking error return values.\n    72\u2192func ReadRemoteFile(url string) ([]byte, error) {\n    73\u2192\tvar data []byte\n    74\u2192\tresp, err := http.Get(url)\n    75\u2192\tif err == nil {\n    76\u2192\t\tdefer func() {\n    77\u2192\t\t\t_ = resp.Body.Close()\n    78\u2192\t\t}()\n    79\u2192\t\tdata, err = io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n    80\u2192\t}\n    81\u2192\treturn data, err\n    82\u2192}\n    83\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

command\n    54\u2192func NewCommand() *cobra.Command {\n    55\u2192\tvar (\n    56\u2192\t\tredisClient              *redis.Client\n    57\u2192\t\tinsecure                 bool\n   98\u2192\t)\n    99\u2192\tcommand := &cobra.Command{\n   100\u2192\t\tUse:               cliName,\n   101\u2192\t\tShort:             \"Run the ArgoCD API server\",\n   102\u2192\t\tLong:              \"The API server is a gRPC/REST server which exposes the API consumed by the Web UI, CLI, and CI/CD systems.  This command runs API server in the foreground. 106\u2192\n   107\u2192\t\t\tvers := common.GetVersion()\n   108\u2192\t\t\tnamespace, _, err := clientConfig.Namespace()\n   109\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   110\u2192\t\t\tvers.LogStartupInfo(\n   111\u2192\t\t\t\t\"ArgoCD API Server\",\n   112\u2192\t\t\t\tmap[string]any{\n   113\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"namespace\": namespace,\n   114\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"port\": 120\u2192\t\t\tcli.SetGLogLevel(glogLevel)\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192\t\t\tconfig, err := clientConfig.ClientConfig()\n   123\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   124\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(v1alpha1.SetK8SConfigDefaults(config))\n   125\u2192\n   126\u2192\t\t\ttlsConfigCustomizer, err := tlsConfigCustomizerSrc()\n 131\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   132\u2192\n   133\u2192\t\t\tkubeclientset := kubernetes.NewForConfigOrDie(config)\n   134\u2192\n   135\u2192\t\t\tappclientsetConfig, err := clientConfig.ClientConfig()\n   136\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   137\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(v1alpha1.SetK8SConfigDefaults(appclientsetConfig))\n   138\u2192\t\t\tconfig.UserAgent = fmt.Sprintf(\"argocd-server/%s (%s)\", vers.Version, vers.Platform)\n   139\u2192\n   140\u2192\t\t\tif failureRetryCount > 0 {\n   141\u2192\t\t\t\tappclientsetConfig = kube.AddFailureRetryWrapper(appclientsetConfig, failureRetryCount, failureRetryPeriodMilliSeconds)\n   142\u2192\t\t\t}\n   143\u2192\t\t\tappClientSet := appclientset.NewForConfigOrDie(appclientsetConfig)\n   144\u2192\t\t\ttlsConfig := apiclient.TLSConfiguration{\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\tDisableTLS:       repoServerPlaintext,\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\tStrictValidation: repoServerStrictTLS,\n   147\u2192\t\t\t}\n   148\u2192\n   149\u2192\t\t\tdynamicClient := dynamic.NewForConfigOrDie(config)\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192\t\t\tscheme
