158\u2192\t\t\tcontrollerClient = client.NewNamespacedClient(controllerClient, namespace)\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192\t\t\t// Load CA information to use for validating connections to the\n   161\u2192\t\t\t// repository server, if strict TLS validation was requested.\n   162\u2192\t\t\tif !repoServerPlaintext && repoServerStrictTLS {\n   163\u2192\t\t\t\tpool, err := tls.LoadX509CertPool(\n   164\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"%s/server/tls/tls.crt\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath)),\n   165\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"%s/server/tls/ca.crt\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath)),\n   166\u2192\t\t\t\t)\n   167\u2192\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   168\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"%v\", err)\n   169\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   170\u2192\t\t\t\ttlsConfig.Certificates = pool\n   171\u2192\t\t\t}\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192\t\t\tdexTlsConfig := &dex.DexTLSConfig{\n   174\u2192\t\t\t\tDisableTLS:       dexServerPlaintext,\n   175\u2192\t\t\t\tStrictValidation: dexServerStrictTLS,\n   176\u2192\t\t\t}\n   177\u2192\n   178\u2192\t\t\tif !dexServerPlaintext && dexServerStrictTLS {\n   179\u2192\t\t\t\tpool, err := tls.LoadX509CertPool(\n   180\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"%s/dex/tls/ca.crt\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath)),\n   181\u2192\t\t\t\t)\n   182\u2192\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   183\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"%v\", err)\n   184\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   185\u2192\t\t\t\tdexTlsConfig.RootCAs = pool\n   186\u2192\t\t\t\tcert, err := tls.LoadX509Cert(\n   187\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"%s/dex/tls/tls.crt\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath)),\n   188\u2192\t\t\t\t)\n   189\u2192\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   190\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"%v\", err)\n   191\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   192\u2192\t\t\t\tdexTlsConfig.Certificate = cert.Raw\n   193\u2192\t\t\t}\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192\t\t\trepoclientset := apiclient.NewRepoServerClientset(repoServerAddress, repoServerTimeoutSeconds, tlsConfig)\n   196\u2192\t\t\tif rootPath != \"\" {\n   197\u2192\t\t\t\tif baseHRef != \"\" && baseHRef != rootPath {\n   198\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlog.Warnf(\"--basehref and --rootpath had conflict: basehref: %s rootpath: %s\", baseHRef, rootPath)\n   199\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   200\u2192\t\t\t\tbaseHRef = rootPath\n   201\u2192\t\t\t}\n   202\u2192\n   203\u2192\t\t\tvar contentTypesList []string\n   204\u2192\t\t\tif contentTypes != \"\" {\n   205\u2192\t\t\t\tcontentTypesList = strings.Split(contentTypes, \";\")\n   206\u2192\t\t\t}\n   207\u2192\n   208\u2192\t\t\targoCDOpts := server.ArgoCDServerOpts{\n   209\u2192\t\t\t\tInsecure:                insecure,\n   210\u2192\t\t\t\tListenPort:              listenPort,\n   211\u2192\t\t\t\tListenHost:              listenHost,\n   212\u2192\t\t\t\tMetricsPort:             metricsPort,\n   213\u2192\t\t\t\tMetricsHost:             metricsHost,\n   214\u2192\t\t\t\tNamespace:               namespace,\n   215\u2192\t\t\t\tBaseHRef:                baseHRef,\n   216\u2192\t\t\t\tRootPath:                rootPath,\n   217\u2192\t\t\t\tDynamicClientset:        dynamicClient,\n   218\u2192\t\t\t\tKubeControllerClientset: controllerClient,\n   219\u2192\t\t\t\tKubeClientset:           kubeclientset,\n   220\u2192\t\t\t\tAppClientset:            appClientSet,\n   221\u2192\t\t\t\tRepoClientset:           repoclientset,\n   222\u2192\t\t\t\tDexServerAddr:           dexServerAddress,\n   223\u2192\t\t\t\tDexTLSConfig:            dexTlsConfig,\n   224\u2192\t\t\t\tDisableAuth:             disableAuth,\n   225\u2192\t\t\t\tContentTypes:            contentTypesList,\n   226\u2192\t\t\t\tEnableGZip:              enableGZip,\n   227\u2192\t\t\t\tTLSConfigCustomizer:     tlsConfigCustomizer,\n   228\u2192\t\t\t\tCache:                   cache,\n   229\u2192\t\t\t\tRepoServerCache:         repoServerCache,\n   230\u2192\t\t\t\tXFrameOptions:           frameOptions,\n   231\u2192\t\t\t\tContentSecurityPolicy:   contentSecurityPolicy,\n   232\u2192\t\t\t\tRedisClient:             redisClient,\n   233\u2192\t\t\t\tStaticAssetsDir:         staticAssetsDir,\n   234\u2192\t\t\t\tApplicationNamespaces:   applicationNamespaces,\n   235\u2192\t\t\t\tEnableProxyExtension:    enableProxyExtension,\n   236\u2192\t\t\t\tWebhookParallelism:      webhookParallelism,\n   237\u2192\t\t\t\tEnableK8sEvent:          enableK8sEvent,\n   238\u2192\t\t\t}\n   239\u2192\n   240\u2192\t\t\tappsetOpts := server.ApplicationSetOpts{\n   241\u2192\t\t\t\tGitSubmoduleEnabled:      gitSubmoduleEnabled,\n   242\u2192\t\t\t\tEnableNewGitFileGlobbing: enableNewGitFileGlobbing,\n   243\u2192\t\t\t\tScmRootCAPath:            scmRootCAPath,\n   244\u2192\t\t\t\tAllowedScmProviders:      allowedScmProviders,\n   245\u2192\t\t\t\tEnableScmProviders:       enableScmProviders,\n   246\u2192\t\t\t}\n   247\u2192\n   248\u2192\t\t\tstats.RegisterStackDumper()\n   249\u2192\t\t\tstats.StartStatsTicker(10 * time.Minute)\n   250\u2192\t\t\tstats.RegisterHeapDumper(\"memprofile\")\n   251\u2192\t\t\targocd := server.NewServer(ctx, argoCDOpts, appsetOpts)\n   252\u2192\t\t\targocd.Init(ctx)\n   253\u2192\t\t\tlns, err := argocd.Listen()\n   254\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   255\u2192\t\t\tfor {\n   256\u2192\t\t\t\tvar closer func()\n   257\u2192\t\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(ctx)\n   258\u2192\t\t\t\tif otlpAddress != \"\" {\n   259\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcloser, err = traceutil.InitTracer(ctx, \"argocd-server\", otlpAddress, otlpInsecure, otlpHeaders, otlpAttrs)\n   260\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   261\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"failed to initialize tracing: %v\", err)\n   262\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   263\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   264\u2192\t\t\t\targocd.Run(ctx, lns)\n   265\u2192\t\t\t\tcancel()\n   266\u2192\t\t\t\tif closer != nil {\n   267\u2192\t\t\t\t\tcloser()\n   268\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   269\u2192\t\t\t}\n   270\u2192\t\t},\n   271\u2192\t\tExample: templates.Examples(`\n   272\u2192\t\t\t# Start the Argo CD API server with default settings\n   273\u2192\t\t\t$ argocd-server\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192\t\t\t# Start the Argo CD API server on a custom port and enable tracing\n   276\u2192\t\t\t$ argocd-server --port 8888 --otlp-address localhost:4317\n   277\u2192\t\t`),\n   278\u2192\t}\n   279\u2192\n   280\u2192\tclientConfig = cli.AddKubectlFlagsToCmd(command)\n   281\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&insecure, \"insecure\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_INSECURE\", false), \"Run server without TLS\")\n   282\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&staticAssetsDir, \"staticassets\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_STATIC_ASSETS\", \"/shared/app\"), \"Directory path that contains additional static assets\")\n   283\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&baseHRef, \"basehref\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_BASEHREF\", \"/\"), \"Value for base href in index.html. Used if Argo CD is running behind reverse proxy under subpath different from /\")\n   284\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&rootPath, \"rootpath\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_ROOTPATH\", \"\"), \"Used if Argo CD is running behind reverse proxy under subpath different from /\")\n   285\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&cmdutil.LogFormat, \"logformat\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_LOGFORMAT\", \"text\"), \"Set the logging format. One of: text|json\")\n   286\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&cmdutil.LogLevel, \"loglevel\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_LOG_LEVEL\", \"info\"), \"Set the logging level. One of: debug|info|warn|error\")\n   287\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&glogLevel, \"gloglevel\", 0, \"Set the glog logging level\")\n   288\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&repoServerAddress, \"repo-server\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_REPO_SERVER\", common.DefaultRepoServerAddr), \"Repo server address\")\n   289\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&dexServerAddress, \"dex-server\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_DEX_SERVER\", common.DefaultDexServerAddr), \"Dex server address\")\n   290\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&disableAuth, \"disable-auth\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_DISABLE_AUTH\", false), \"Disable client authentication\")\n   291\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&contentTypes, \"api-content-types\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_API_CONTENT_TYPES\", \"application/json\", env.StringFromEnvOpts{AllowEmpty: true}), \"Semicolon separated list of allowed content types for non GET api requests. Any content type is allowed if empty.\")\n   292\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enableGZip, \"enable-gzip\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_ENABLE_GZIP\", true), \"Enable GZIP compression\")\n   293\u2192\tcommand.AddCommand(cli.NewVersionCmd(cliName))\n   294\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&listenHost, \"address\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_LISTEN_ADDRESS\", common.DefaultAddressAPIServer), \"Listen on given address\")\n   295\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&listenPort, \"port\", common.DefaultPortAPIServer, \"Listen on given port\")\n   296\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&metricsHost, env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_METRICS_LISTEN_ADDRESS\", \"metrics-address\"), common.DefaultAddressAPIServerMetrics, \"Listen for metrics on given address\")\n   297\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&metricsPort, \"metrics-port\", common.DefaultPortArgoCDAPIServerMetrics, \"Start metrics on given port\")\n   298\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&otlpAddress, \"otlp-address\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_OTLP_ADDRESS\", \"\"), \"OpenTelemetry collector address to send traces to\")\n   299\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&otlpInsecure, \"otlp-insecure\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_OTLP_INSECURE\", true), \"OpenTelemetry collector insecure mode\")\n   300\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringToStringVar(&otlpHeaders, \"otlp-headers\", env.ParseStringToStringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_OTLP_HEADERS\", map[string]string{}, \",\"), \"List of OpenTelemetry collector extra headers sent with traces, headers are comma-separated key-value pairs(e.g. key1=value1,key2=value2)\")\n   301\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&otlpAttrs, \"otlp-attrs\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_OTLP_ATTRS\", []string{}, \",\"), \"List of OpenTelemetry collector extra attrs when send traces, each attribute is separated by a colon(e.g. key:value)\")\n   302\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&repoServerTimeoutSeconds, \"repo-server-timeout-seconds\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_REPO_SERVER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS\", 60, 0, math.MaxInt64), \"Repo server RPC call timeout seconds.\")\n   303\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&frameOptions, \"x-frame-options\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_X_FRAME_OPTIONS\", \"sameorigin\"), \"Set X-Frame-Options header in HTTP responses to `value`. To disable, set to \\\"\\\".\")\n   304\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&contentSecurityPolicy, \"content-security-policy\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_CONTENT_SECURITY_POLICY\", \"frame-ancestors 'self';\"), \"Set Content-Security-Policy header in HTTP responses to `value`. To disable, set to \\\"\\\".\")\n   305\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&repoServerPlaintext, \"repo-server-plaintext\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_REPO_SERVER_PLAINTEXT\", false), \"Use a plaintext client (non-TLS) to connect to repository server\")\n   306\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&repoServerStrictTLS, \"repo-server-strict-tls\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_REPO_SERVER_STRICT_TLS\", false), \"Perform strict validation of TLS certificates when connecting to repo server\")\n   307\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&dexServerPlaintext, \"dex-server-plaintext\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_DEX_SERVER_PLAINTEXT\", false), \"Use a plaintext client (non-TLS) to connect to dex server\")\n   308\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&dexServerStrictTLS, \"dex-server-strict-tls\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_DEX_SERVER_STRICT_TLS\", false), \"Perform strict validation of TLS certificates when connecting to dex server\")\n   309\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&applicationNamespaces, \"application-namespaces\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_NAMESPACES\", []string{}, \",\"), \"List of additional namespaces where application resources can be managed in\")\n   310\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enableProxyExtension, \"enable-proxy-extension\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_ENABLE_PROXY_EXTENSION\", false), \"Enable Proxy Extension feature\")\n   311\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&webhookParallelism, \"webhook-parallelism-limit\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_SERVER_WEBHOOK_PARALLELISM_LIMIT\", 50, 1, 1000), \"Number of webhook requests processed concurrently\")\n   312\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&enableK8sEvent, \"enable-k8s-event\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_ENABLE_K8S_EVENT\", argo.DefaultEnableEventList(), \",\"), \"Enable ArgoCD to use k8s event. For disabling all events, set the value as `none`. (e.g --enable-k8s-event=none), For enabling specific events, set the value as `event reason`. (e.g --enable-k8s-event=StatusRefreshed,ResourceCreated)\")\n   313\u2192\n   314\u2192\t// Flags related to the applicationSet component.\n   315\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&scmRootCAPath, \"appset-scm-root-ca-path\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_SCM_ROOT_CA_PATH\", \"\"), \"Provide Root CA Path for self-signed TLS Certificates\")\n   316\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enableScmProviders, \"appset-enable-scm-providers\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_ENABLE_SCM_PROVIDERS\", true), \"Enable retrieving information from SCM providers, used by the SCM and PR generators (Default: true)\")\n   317\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&allowedScmProviders, \"appset-allowed-scm-providers\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_ALLOWED_SCM_PROVIDERS\", []string{}, \",\"), \"The list of allowed custom SCM provider API URLs. This restriction does not apply to SCM or PR generators which do not accept a custom API URL. (Default: Empty = all)\")\n   318\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enableNewGitFileGlobbing, \"appset-enable-new-git-file-globbing\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATIONSET_CONTROLLER_ENABLE_NEW_GIT_FILE_GLOBBING\", false), \"Enable new globbing in Git files generator.\")\n   319\u2192\n   320\u2192\ttlsConfigCustomizerSrc = tls.AddTLSFlagsToCmd(command)\n   321\u2192\tcacheSrc = servercache.AddCacheFlagsToCmd(command, cacheutil.Options{\n   322\u2192\t\tOnClientCreated: func(client *redis.Client) {\n   323\u2192\t\t\tredisClient = client\n   324\u2192\t\t},\n   325\u2192\t})\n   326\u2192\trepoServerCacheSrc = reposervercache.AddCacheFlagsToCmd(command, cacheutil.Options{FlagPrefix: \"repo-server-\"})\n   327\u2192\treturn command\n   328\u2192}\n   329\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
70. Read @ -
Input

  "file_path": "/workspace/cmd/argocd-application-controller/commands/argocd_application_controller.go"
}
Output

name of the CLI\n    43\u2192\tcliName = common.ApplicationController\n    44\u2192\t// Default time in seconds for application resync period\n    45\u2192\tdefaultAppResyncPeriod = 180\n    46\u2192\t// Default time in seconds for application hard resync period\n    47\u2192\tdefaultAppHardResyncPeriod = 0\n    48\u2192)\n    49\u2192\n    50\u2192func NewCommand() *cobra.Command {\n    51\u2192\tvar (\n    52\u2192\t\tworkqueueRateLimit               ratelimiter.AppControllerRateLimiterConfig\n    53\u2192\t\tclientConfig                     clientcmd.ClientConfig\n    54\u2192\t\tappResyncPeriod                  int64\n    55\u2192\t\tappHardResyncPeriod              int64\n    56\u2192\t\tappResyncJitter                  int64\n    57\u2192\t\trepoErrorGracePeriod             int64\n    58\u2192\t\trepoServerAddress                string\n    59\u2192\t\trepoServerTimeoutSeconds         int\n    60\u2192\t\tselfHealTimeoutSeconds           int\n    61\u2192\t\tselfHealBackoffTimeoutSeconds    int\n    62\u2192\t\tselfHealBackoffFactor            int\n    63\u2192\t\tselfHealBackoffCapSeconds        int\n    64\u2192\t\tstatusProcessors                 int\n    65\u2192\t\toperationProcessors              int\n    66\u2192\t\tglogLevel                        int\n    67\u2192\t\tmetricsPort                      int\n    68\u2192\t\tmetricsCacheExpiration           time.Duration\n    69\u2192\t\tmetricsAplicationLabels          []string\n    70\u2192\t\tmetricsAplicationConditions      []string\n    71\u2192\t\tkubectlParallelismLimit          int64\n    72\u2192\t\tcacheSource                      func() (*appstatecache.Cache, error)\n    73\u2192\t\tredisClient                      *redis.Client\n    74\u2192\t\trepoServerPlaintext              bool\n    75\u2192\t\trepoServerStrictTLS              bool\n    76\u2192\t\totlpAddress                      string\n    77\u2192\t\totlpInsecure                     bool\n    78\u2192\t\totlpHeaders                      map[string]string\n    79\u2192\t\totlpAttrs                        []string\n    80\u2192\t\tapplicationNamespaces            []string\n    81\u2192\t\tpersistResourceHealth            bool\n    82\u2192\t\tshardingAlgorithm                string\n    83\u2192\t\tenableDynamicClusterDistribution bool\n    84\u2192\t\tserverSideDiff                   bool\n    85\u2192\t\tignoreNormalizerOpts             normalizers.IgnoreNormalizerOpts\n    86\u2192\n    87\u2192\t\t// argocd k8s event logging flag\n    88\u2192\t\tenableK8sEvent []string\n    89\u2192\t)\n    90\u2192\tcommand := cobra.Command{\n    91\u2192\t\tUse:               cliName,\n    92\u2192\t\tShort:             \"Run ArgoCD Application Controller\",\n    93\u2192\t\tLong:              \"ArgoCD application controller is a Kubernetes controller that continuously monitors running applications and compares the current, live state against the desired target state (as specified in the repo). This command runs Application Controller in the foreground.  It can be configured by following options.\",\n    94\u2192\t\tDisableAutoGenTag: true,\n    95\u2192\t\tRunE: func(c *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\n    96\u2192\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(c.Context())\n    97\u2192\t\t\tdefer cancel()\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192\t\t\tvers := common.GetVersion()\n   100\u2192\t\t\tnamespace, _, err := clientConfig.Namespace()\n   101\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   102\u2192\t\t\tvers.LogStartupInfo(\n   103\u2192\t\t\t\t\"ArgoCD Application Controller\",\n   104\u2192\t\t\t\tmap[string]any{\n   105\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"namespace\": namespace,\n   106\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n   107\u2192\t\t\t)\n   108\u2192\n   109\u2192\t\t\tcli.SetLogFormat(cmdutil.LogFormat)\n   110\u2192\t\t\tcli.SetLogLevel(cmdutil.LogLevel)\n   111\u2192\t\t\tcli.SetGLogLevel(glogLevel)\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192\t\t\tconfig, err := clientConfig.ClientConfig()\n   114\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   115\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(v1alpha1.SetK8SConfigDefaults(config))\n   116\u2192\t\t\tconfig.UserAgent = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s/%s (%s)\", common.DefaultApplicationControllerName, vers.Version, vers.Platform)\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192\t\t\tkubeClient := kubernetes.NewForConfigOrDie(config)\n   119\u2192\t\t\tappClient := appclientset.NewForConfigOrDie(config)\n   120\u2192\n   121\u2192\t\t\thardResyncDuration := time.Duration(appHardResyncPeriod) * time.Second\n   122\u2192\n   123\u2192\t\t\tvar resyncDuration time.Duration\n   124\u2192\t\t\tif appResyncPeriod == 0 {\n   125\u2192\t\t\t\t// Re-sync should be disabled if period is 0. Set duration to a very long duration\n   126\u2192\t\t\t\tresyncDuration = time.Hour * 24 * 365 * 100\n   127\u2192\t\t\t} else {\n   128\u2192\t\t\t\tresyncDuration = time.Duration(appResyncPeriod) * time.Second\n   129\u2192\t\t\t}\n   130\u2192\n   131\u2192\t\t\ttlsConfig := apiclient.TLSConfiguration{\n   132\u2192\t\t\t\tDisableTLS:       repoServerPlaintext,\n   133\u2192\t\t\t\tStrictValidation: repoServerStrictTLS,\n   134\u2192\t\t\t}\n   135\u2192\n   136\u2192\t\t\t// Load CA information to use for validating connections to the\n   137\u2192\t\t\t// repository server, if strict TLS validation was requested.\n   138\u2192\t\t\tif !repoServerPlaintext && repoServerStrictTLS {\n   139\u2192\t\t\t\tpool, err := tls.LoadX509CertPool(\n   140\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"%s/controller/tls/tls.crt\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath)),\n   141\u2192\t\t\t\t\tfmt.Sprintf(\"%s/controller/tls/ca.crt\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvAppConfigPath, common.DefaultAppConfigPath)),\n   142\u2192\t\t\t\t)\n   143\u2192\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   144\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"%v\", err)\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\ttlsConfig.Certificates = pool\n   147\u2192\t\t\t}\n   148\u2192\n   149\u2192\t\t\trepoClientset := apiclient.NewRepoServerClientset(repoServerAddress, repoServerTimeoutSeconds, tlsConfig)\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192\t\t\tcache, err := cacheSource()\n   152\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   153\u2192\t\t\tcache.Cache.SetClient(cacheutil.NewTwoLevelClient(cache.Cache.GetClient(), 10*time.Minute))\n   154\u2192\n   155\u2192\t\t\tvar appController *controller.ApplicationController\n   156\u2192\n   157\u2192\t\t\tsettingsMgr := settings.NewSettingsManager(ctx, kubeClient, namespace, settings.WithRepoOrClusterChangedHandler(func() {\n   158\u2192\t\t\t\tappController.InvalidateProjectsCache()\n   159\u2192\t\t\t}))\n   160\u2192\t\t\tkubectl := kubeutil.NewKubectl()\n   161\u2192\t\t\tclusterSharding, err := sharding.GetClusterSharding(kubeClient, settingsMgr, shardingAlgorithm, enableDynamicClusterDistribution)\n   162\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   163\u2192\t\t\tvar selfHealBackoff *wait.Backoff\n   164\u2192\t\t\tif selfHealBackoffTimeoutSeconds != 0 {\n   165\u2192\t\t\t\tselfHealBackoff = &wait.Backoff{\n   166\u2192\t\t\t\t\tDuration: time.Duration(selfHealBackoffTimeoutSeconds) * time.Second,\n   167\u2192\t\t\t\t\tFactor:   float64(selfHealBackoffFactor),\n   168\u2192\t\t\t\t\tCap:      time.Duration(selfHealBackoffCapSeconds) * time.Second,\n   169\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   170\u2192\t\t\t}\n   171\u2192\t\t\tappController, err = controller.NewApplicationController(\n   172\u2192\t\t\t\tnamespace,\n   173\u2192\t\t\t\tsettingsMgr,\n   174\u2192\t\t\t\tkubeClient,\n   175\u2192\t\t\t\tappClient,\n   176\u2192\t\t\t\trepoClientset,\n   177\u2192\t\t\t\tcache,\n   178\u2192\t\t\t\tkubectl,\n   179\u2192\t\t\t\tresyncDuration,\n   180\u2192\t\t\t\thardResyncDuration,\n   181\u2192\t\t\t\ttime.Duration(appResyncJitter)*time.Second,\n   182\u2192\t\t\t\ttime.Duration(selfHealTimeoutSeconds)*time.Second,\n   183\u2192\t\t\t\tselfHealBackoff,\n   184\u2192\t\t\t\ttime.Duration(repoErrorGracePeriod)*time.Second,\n   185\u2192\t\t\t\tmetricsPort,\n   186\u2192\t\t\t\tmetricsCacheExpiration,\n   187\u2192\t\t\t\tmetricsAplicationLabels,\n   188\u2192\t\t\t\tmetricsAplicationConditions,\n   189\u2192\t\t\t\tkubectlParallelismLimit,\n   190\u2192\t\t\t\tpersistResourceHealth,\n   191\u2192\t\t\t\tclusterSharding,\n   192\u2192\t\t\t\tapplicationNamespaces,\n   193\u2192\t\t\t\t&workqueueRateLimit,\n   194\u2192\t\t\t\tserverSideDiff,\n   195\u2192\t\t\t\tenableDynamicClusterDistribution,\n   196\u2192\t\t\t\tignoreNormalizerOpts,\n   197\u2192\t\t\t\tenableK8sEvent,\n   198\u2192\t\t\t)\n   199\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   200\u2192\t\t\tcacheutil.CollectMetrics(redisClient, appController.GetMetricsServer())\n   201\u2192\n   202\u2192\t\t\tstats.RegisterStackDumper()\n   203\u2192\t\t\tstats.StartStatsTicker(10 * time.Minute)\n   204\u2192\t\t\tstats.RegisterHeapDumper(\"memprofile\")\n   205\u2192\n   206\u2192\t\t\tif otlpAddress != \"\" {\n   207\u2192\t\t\t\tcloseTracer, err := trace.InitTracer(ctx, \"argocd-controller\", otlpAddress, otlpInsecure, otlpHeaders, otlpAttrs)\n   208\u2192\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   209\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"failed to initialize tracing: %v\", err)\n   210\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   211\u2192\t\t\t\tdefer closeTracer()\n   212\u2192\t\t\t}\n   213\u2192\n   214\u2192\t\t\t// Graceful shutdown code\n   215\u2192\t\t\tsigCh := make(chan os.Signal, 1)\n   216\u2192\t\t\tsignal.Notify(sigCh, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)\n   217\u2192\t\t\tgo func() {\n   218\u2192\t\t\t\ts := <-sigCh\n   219\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"got signal %v, attempting graceful shutdown\", s)\n   220\u2192\t\t\t\tcancel()\n   221\u2192\t\t\t}()\n   222\u2192\n   223\u2192\t\t\tgo appController.Run(ctx, statusProcessors, operationProcessors)\n   224\u2192\n   225\u2192\t\t\t<-ctx.Done()\n   226\u2192\n   227\u2192\t\t\tlog.Println(\"clean shutdown\")\n   228\u2192\n   229\u2192\t\t\treturn nil\n   230\u2192\t\t},\n   231\u2192\t}\n   232\u2192\n   233\u2192\tclientConfig = cli.AddKubectlFlagsToCmd(&command)\n   234\u2192\tcommand.Flags().Int64Var(&appResyncPeriod, \"app-resync\", int64(env.ParseDurationFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_RECONCILIATION_TIMEOUT\", defaultAppResyncPeriod*time.Second, 0, math.MaxInt64).Seconds()), \"Time period in seconds for application resync.\")\n   235\u2192\tcommand.Flags().Int64Var(&appHardResyncPeriod, \"app-hard-resync\", int64(env.ParseDurationFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_HARD_RECONCILIATION_TIMEOUT\", defaultAppHardResyncPeriod*time.Second, 0, math.MaxInt64).Seconds()), \"Time period in seconds for application hard resync.\")\n   236\u2192\tcommand.Flags().Int64Var(&appResyncJitter, \"app-resync-jitter\", int64(env.ParseDurationFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_RECONCILIATION_JITTER\", 0*time.Second, 0, math.MaxInt64).Seconds()), \"Maximum time period in seconds to add as a delay jitter for application resync.\")\n   237\u2192\tcommand.Flags().Int64Var(&repoErrorGracePeriod, \"repo-error-grace-period-seconds\", int64(env.ParseDurationFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_ERROR_GRACE_PERIOD_SECONDS\", defaultAppResyncPeriod*time.Second, 0, math.MaxInt64).Seconds()), \"Grace period in seconds for ignoring consecutive errors while communicating with repo server.\")\n   238\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&repoServerAddress, \"repo-server\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_REPO_SERVER\", common.DefaultRepoServerAddr), \"Repo server address.\")\n   239\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&repoServerTimeoutSeconds, \"repo-server-timeout-seconds\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_REPO_SERVER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS\", 60, 0, math.MaxInt64), \"Repo server RPC call timeout seconds.\")\n   240\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&statusProcessors, \"status-processors\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_STATUS_PROCESSORS\", 20, 0, math.MaxInt32), \"Number of application status processors\")\n   241\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&operationProcessors, \"operation-processors\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_OPERATION_PROCESSORS\", 10, 0, math.MaxInt32), \"Number of application operation processors\")\n   242\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&cmdutil.LogFormat, \"logformat\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_LOGFORMAT\", \"text\"), \"Set the logging format. One of: text|json\")\n   243\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&cmdutil.LogLevel, \"loglevel\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_LOGLEVEL\", \"info\"), \"Set the logging level. One of: debug|info|warn|error\")\n   244\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&glogLevel, \"gloglevel\", 0, \"Set the glog logging level\")\n   245\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&metricsPort, \"metrics-port\", common.DefaultPortArgoCDMetrics, \"Start metrics server on given port\")\n   246\u2192\tcommand.Flags().DurationVar(&metricsCacheExpiration, \"metrics-cache-expiration\", env.ParseDurationFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_METRICS_CACHE_EXPIRATION\", 0*time.Second, 0, math.MaxInt64), \"Prometheus metrics cache expiration (disabled  by default. e.g. 24h0m0s)\")\n   247\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&selfHealTimeoutSeconds, \"self-heal-timeout-seconds\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_SELF_HEAL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS\", 0, 0, math.MaxInt32), \"Specifies timeout between application self heal attempts\")\n   248\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&selfHealBackoffTimeoutSeconds, \"self-heal-backoff-timeout-seconds\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_SELF_HEAL_BACKOFF_TIMEOUT_SECONDS\", 2, 0, math.MaxInt32), \"Specifies initial timeout of exponential backoff between self heal attempts\")\n   249\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&selfHealBackoffFactor, \"self-heal-backoff-factor\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_SELF_HEAL_BACKOFF_FACTOR\", 3, 0, math.MaxInt32), \"Specifies factor of exponential timeout between application self heal attempts\")\n   250\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&selfHealBackoffCapSeconds, \"self-heal-backoff-cap-seconds\", env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_SELF_HEAL_BACKOFF_CAP_SECONDS\", 300, 0, math.MaxInt32), \"Specifies max timeout of exponential backoff between application self heal attempts\")\n   251\u2192\tcommand.Flags().Int64Var(&kubectlParallelismLimit, \"kubectl-parallelism-limit\", env.ParseInt64FromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_KUBECTL_PARALLELISM_LIMIT\", 20, 0, math.MaxInt64), \"Number of allowed concurrent kubectl fork/execs. Any value less than 1 means no limit.\")\n   252\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&repoServerPlaintext, \"repo-server-plaintext\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_REPO_SERVER_PLAINTEXT\", false), \"Disable TLS on connections to repo server\")\n   253\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&repoServerStrictTLS, \"repo-server-strict-tls\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_REPO_SERVER_STRICT_TLS\", false), \"Whether to use strict validation of the TLS cert presented by the repo server\")\n   254\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&metricsAplicationLabels, \"metrics-application-labels\", []string{}, \"List of Application labels that will be added to the argocd_application_labels metric\")\n   255\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&metricsAplicationConditions, \"metrics-application-conditions\", []string{}, \"List of Application conditions that will be added to the argocd_application_conditions metric\")\n   256\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&otlpAddress, \"otlp-address\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_OTLP_ADDRESS\", \"\"), \"OpenTelemetry collector address to send traces to\")\n   257\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&otlpInsecure, \"otlp-insecure\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_OTLP_INSECURE\", true), \"OpenTelemetry collector insecure mode\")\n   258\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringToStringVar(&otlpHeaders, \"otlp-headers\", env.ParseStringToStringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_OTLP_HEADERS\", map[string]string{}, \",\"), \"List of OpenTelemetry collector extra headers sent with traces, headers are comma-separated key-value pairs(e.g. key1=value1,key2=value2)\")\n   259\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&otlpAttrs, \"otlp-attrs\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_OTLP_ATTRS\", []string{}, \",\"), \"List of OpenTelemetry collector extra attrs when send traces, each attribute is separated by a colon(e.g. key:value)\")\n   260\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&applicationNamespaces, \"application-namespaces\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_NAMESPACES\", []string{}, \",\"), \"List of additional namespaces that applications are allowed to be reconciled from\")\n   261\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&persistResourceHealth, \"persist-resource-health\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_APPLICATION_CONTROLLER_PERSIST_RESOURCE_HEALTH\", true), \"Enables storing the managed resources health in the Application CRD\")\n   262\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&shardingAlgorithm, \"sharding-method\", env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvControllerShardingAlgorithm, common.DefaultShardingAlgorithm), \"Enables choice of sharding method. Supported sharding methods are : [legacy, round-robin, consistent-hashing] \")\n   263\u2192\t// global queue rate limit config\n   264\u2192\tcommand.Flags().Int64Var(&workqueueRateLimit.BucketSize, \"wq-bucket-size\", env.ParseInt64FromEnv(\"WORKQUEUE_BUCKET_SIZE\", 500, 1, math.MaxInt64), \"Set Workqueue Rate Limiter Bucket Size, default 500\")\n   265\u2192\tcommand.Flags().Float64Var(&workqueueRateLimit.BucketQPS, \"wq-bucket-qps\", env.ParseFloat64FromEnv(\"WORKQUEUE_BUCKET_QPS\", math.MaxFloat64, 1, math.MaxFloat64), \"Set Workqueue Rate Limiter Bucket QPS, default set to MaxFloat64 which disables the bucket limiter\")\n   266\u2192\t// individual item rate limit config\n   267\u2192\t// when WORKQUEUE_FAILURE_COOLDOWN is 0 per item rate limiting is disabled(default)\n   268\u2192\tcommand.Flags().DurationVar(&workqueueRateLimit.FailureCoolDown, \"wq-cooldown-ns\", time.Duration(env.ParseInt64FromEnv(\"WORKQUEUE_FAILURE_COOLDOWN_NS\", 0, 0, (24*time.Hour).Nanoseconds())), \"Set Workqueue Per Item Rate Limiter Cooldown duration in ns, default 0(per item rate limiter disabled)\")\n   269\u2192\tcommand.Flags().DurationVar(&workqueueRateLimit.BaseDelay, \"wq-basedelay-ns\", time.Duration(env.ParseInt64FromEnv(\"WORKQUEUE_BASE_DELAY_NS\", time.Millisecond.Nanoseconds(), time.Nanosecond.Nanoseconds(), (24*time.Hour).Nanoseconds())), \"Set Workqueue Per Item Rate Limiter Base Delay duration in nanoseconds, default 1000000 (1ms)\")\n   270\u2192\tcommand.Flags().DurationVar(&workqueueRateLimit.MaxDelay, \"wq-maxdelay-ns\", time.Duration(env.ParseInt64FromEnv(\"WORKQUEUE_MAX_DELAY_NS\", time.Second.Nanoseconds(), 1*time.Millisecond.Nanoseconds(), (24*time.Hour).Nanoseconds())), \"Set Workqueue Per Item Rate Limiter Max Delay duration in nanoseconds, default 1000000000 (1s)\")\n   271\u2192\tcommand.Flags().Float64Var(&workqueueRateLimit.BackoffFactor, \"wq-backoff-factor\", env.ParseFloat64FromEnv(\"WORKQUEUE_BACKOFF_FACTOR\", 1.5, 0, math.MaxFloat64), \"Set Workqueue Per Item Rate Limiter Backoff Factor, default is 1.5\")\n   272\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&enableDynamicClusterDistribution, \"dynamic-cluster-distribution-enabled\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(common.EnvEnableDynamicClusterDistribution, false), \"Enables dynamic cluster distribution.\")\n   273\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&serverSideDiff, \"server-side-diff-enabled\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(common.EnvServerSideDiff, false), \"Feature flag to enable ServerSide diff. Default (\\\"false\\\")\")\n   274\u2192\tcommand.Flags().DurationVar(&ignoreNormalizerOpts.JQExecutionTimeout, \"ignore-normalizer-jq-execution-timeout-seconds\", env.ParseDurationFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_IGNORE_NORMALIZER_JQ_TIMEOUT\", 0*time.Second, 0, math.MaxInt64), \"Set ignore normalizer JQ execution timeout\")\n   275\u2192\t// argocd k8s event logging flag\n   276\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&enableK8sEvent, \"enable-k8s-event\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_ENABLE_K8S_EVENT\", argo.DefaultEnableEventList(), \",\"), \"Enable ArgoCD to use k8s event. For disabling all events, set the value as `none`. (e.g --enable-k8s-event=none), For enabling specific events, set the value as `event reason`. (e.g --enable-k8s-event=StatusRefreshed,ResourceCreated)\")\n   277\u2192\n   278\u2192\tcacheSource = appstatecache.AddCacheFlagsToCmd(&command, cacheutil.Options{\n   279\u2192\t\tOnClientCreated: func(client *redis.Client) {\n   280\u2192\t\t\tredisClient = client\n   281\u2192\t\t},\n   282\u2192\t})\n   283\u2192\treturn &command\n   284\u2192}\n   285\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
71. Read @ -

\"argocd-repo-server\"\n    43\u2192)\n    44\u2192\n    45\u2192var (\n    46\u2192\tgnuPGSourcePath                              = env.StringFromEnv(common.EnvGPGDataPath, 48\u2192\tpauseGenerationOnFailureForMinutes           = env.ParseNumFromEnv(common.EnvPauseGenerationMinutes, 60, 0, math.MaxInt32)\n    49\u2192\tpauseGenerationOnFailureForRequests          = env.ParseNumFromEnv(common.EnvPauseGenerationRequests, 0, 0, math.MaxInt32)\n    50\u2192\tgitSubmoduleEnabled                          = env.ParseBoolFromEnv(common.EnvGitSubmoduleEnabled, true)\n    51\u2192)\n    52\u2192\n    53\u2192func NewCommand() *cobra.Command {\n    54\u2192\tvar (\n    55\u2192\t\tparallelismLimit                  int64\n    56\u2192\t\tlistenPort 60\u2192\t\totlpAddress                       string\n    61\u2192\t\totlpInsecure                      bool\n    62\u2192\t\totlpHeaders                       map[string]string\n    63\u2192\t\totlpAttrs                         []string\n    64\u2192\t\tcacheSrc                          func() (*reposervercache.Cache, error)\n    65\u2192\t\ttlsConfigCustomizer 68\u2192\t\tdisableTLS                        bool\n    69\u2192\t\tmaxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize string\n    70\u2192\t\tcmpTarExcludedGlobs               []string\n    71\u2192\t\tallowOutOfBoundsSymlinks          bool\n    72\u2192\t\tstreamedManifestMaxTarSize        string\n    73\u2192\t\tstreamedManifestMaxExtractedSize  string\n    74\u2192\t\thelmManifestMaxExtractedSize      string\n    75\u2192\t\thelmRegistryMaxIndexSize          string\n    76\u2192\t\tdisableManifestMaxExtractedSize   bool\n    77\u2192\t\tincludeHiddenDirectories          bool\n    78\u2192\t)\n    79\u2192\tcommand := cobra.Command{\n    80\u2192\t\tUse:               cliName,\n    81\u2192\t\tShort:             \"Run ArgoCD Repository Server\",\n    82\u2192\t\tLong:              \"ArgoCD Repository Server is an internal service which maintains a local cache of the Git repository holding the application manifests, and is responsible for generating and returning the Kubernetes manifests.  This command runs Repository Server in the foreground.  It can be configured by following options.\",\n    83\u2192\t\tDisableAutoGenTag: true,\n    84\u2192\t\tRunE: func(c *cobra.Command, args []string) error {\n    85\u2192\t\t\tctx := c.Context()\n    86\u2192\n    87\u2192\t\t\tvers := common.GetVersion()\n    88\u2192\t\t\tvers.LogStartupInfo(\n    89\u2192\t\t\t\t\"ArgoCD Repository Server\",\n    90\u2192\t\t\t\tmap[string]any{\n    91\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\"port\": listenPort,\n    92\u2192\t\t\t\t},\n    93\u2192\t\t\t)\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192\t\t\tcli.SetLogFormat(cmdutil.LogFormat)\n    96\u2192\t\t\tcli.SetLogLevel(cmdutil.LogLevel)\n    97\u2192\n    98\u2192\t\t\tif !disableTLS {\n    99\u2192\t\t\t\tvar err error\n   100\u2192\t\t\t\ttlsConfigCustomizer, err = tlsConfigCustomizerSrc()\n   101\u2192\t\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   102\u2192\t\t\t}\n   103\u2192\n   104\u2192\t\t\tcache, err := cacheSrc()\n   105\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   106\u2192\n   107\u2192\t\t\tmaxCombinedDirectoryManifestsQuantity, err := resource.ParseQuantity(maxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize)\n   108\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192\t\t\tstreamedManifestMaxTarSizeQuantity, err := resource.ParseQuantity(streamedManifestMaxTarSize)\n   111\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   112\u2192\n   113\u2192\t\t\tstreamedManifestMaxExtractedSizeQuantity, err := resource.ParseQuantity(streamedManifestMaxExtractedSize)\n   114\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   115\u2192\n   116\u2192\t\t\thelmManifestMaxExtractedSizeQuantity, err := resource.ParseQuantity(helmManifestMaxExtractedSize)\n   117\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   118\u2192\n   119\u2192\t\t\thelmRegistryMaxIndexSizeQuantity, err := resource.ParseQuantity(helmRegistryMaxIndexSize)\n   120\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   121\u2192\n   122\u2192\t\t\taskPassServer := askpass.NewServer(askpass.SocketPath)\n   123\u2192\t\t\tmetricsServer := metrics.NewMetricsServer()\n   124\u2192\t\t\tcacheutil.CollectMetrics(redisClient, metricsServer)\n   125\u2192\t\t\tserver, err := reposerver.NewServer(metricsServer, cache, tlsConfigCustomizer, repository.RepoServerInitConstants{\n   126\u2192\t\t\t\tParallelismLimit: parallelismLimit,\n   127\u2192\t\t\t\tPauseGenerationAfterFailedGenerationAttempts: pauseGenerationAfterFailedGenerationAttempts,\n   128\u2192\t\t\t\tPauseGenerationOnFailureForMinutes:           pauseGenerationOnFailureForMinutes,\n   129\u2192\t\t\t\tPauseGenerationOnFailureForRequests:          pauseGenerationOnFailureForRequests,\n   130\u2192\t\t\t\tSubmoduleEnabled:                             gitSubmoduleEnabled,\n   131\u2192\t\t\t\tMaxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize:            maxCombinedDirectoryManifestsQuantity,\n   132\u2192\t\t\t\tCMPTarExcludedGlobs:                          cmpTarExcludedGlobs,\n   133\u2192\t\t\t\tAllowOutOfBoundsSymlinks:                     allowOutOfBoundsSymlinks,\n   134\u2192\t\t\t\tStreamedManifestMaxExtractedSize:             streamedManifestMaxExtractedSizeQuantity.ToDec().Value(),\n   135\u2192\t\t\t\tStreamedManifestMaxTarSize:                   streamedManifestMaxTarSizeQuantity.ToDec().Value(),\n   136\u2192\t\t\t\tHelmManifestMaxExtractedSize:                 helmManifestMaxExtractedSizeQuantity.ToDec().Value(),\n   137\u2192\t\t\t\tHelmRegistryMaxIndexSize:                     helmRegistryMaxIndexSizeQuantity.ToDec().Value(),\n   138\u2192\t\t\t\tIncludeHiddenDirectories:                     includeHiddenDirectories,\n   139\u2192\t\t\t}, askPassServer)\n   140\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   141\u2192\n   142\u2192\t\t\tif otlpAddress != \"\" {\n   143\u2192\t\t\t\tvar closer func()\n   144\u2192\t\t\t\tvar err error\n   145\u2192\t\t\t\tcloser, err = traceutil.InitTracer(ctx, \"argocd-repo-server\", otlpAddress, otlpInsecure, otlpHeaders, otlpAttrs)\n   146\u2192\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   147\u2192\t\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"failed to initialize tracing: %v\", err)\n   148\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   149\u2192\t\t\t\tdefer closer()\n   150\u2192\t\t\t}\n   151\u2192\n   152\u2192\t\t\tgrpc := server.CreateGRPC()\n   153\u2192\t\t\tlistener, err := net.Listen(\"tcp\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%d\", listenHost, listenPort))\n   154\u2192\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   155\u2192\n   156\u2192\t\t\thealthz.ServeHealthCheck(http.DefaultServeMux, func(r *http.Request) error {\n   157\u2192\t\t\t\tif val, ok := r.URL.Query()[\"full\"]; ok && len(val) > 0 && val[0] == \"true\" {\n   158\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// connect to itself to make sure repo server is able to serve connection\n   159\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// used by liveness probe to auto restart repo server\n   160\u2192\t\t\t\t\t// see https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/5110 for more information\n   161\u2192\t\t\t\t\tconn, err := apiclient.NewConnection(fmt.Sprintf(\"localhost:%d\", listenPort), 60, &apiclient.TLSConfiguration{DisableTLS: disableTLS})\n   162\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   163\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn err\n   164\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   165\u2192\t\t\t\t\tdefer ioutil.Close(conn)\n   166\u2192\t\t\t\t\tclient := grpc_health_v1.NewHealthClient(conn)\n   167\u2192\t\t\t\t\tres, err := client.Check(r.Context(), &grpc_health_v1.HealthCheckRequest{})\n   168\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   169\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn err\n   170\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   171\u2192\t\t\t\t\tif res.Status != grpc_health_v1.HealthCheckResponse_SERVING {\n   172\u2192\t\t\t\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"grpc health check status is '%v'\", res.Status)\n   173\u2192\t\t\t\t\t}\n   174\u2192\t\t\t\t\treturn nil\n   175\u2192\t\t\t\t}\n   176\u2192\t\t\t\treturn nil\n   177\u2192\t\t\t})\n   178\u2192\t\t\thttp.Handle(\"/metrics\", metricsServer.GetHandler())\n   179\u2192\t\t\tgo func() { errors.CheckError(http.ListenAndServe(fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%d\", metricsHost, metricsPort), nil)) }()\n   180\u2192\t\t\tgo func() { errors.CheckError(askPassServer.Run()) }()\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192\t\t\tif gpg.IsGPGEnabled() {\n   183\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Infof(\"Initializing GnuPG keyring at %s\", common.GetGnuPGHomePath())\n   184\u2192\t\t\t\terr = gpg.InitializeGnuPG()\n   185\u2192\t\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   186\u2192\n   187\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Infof(\"Populating GnuPG keyring with keys from %s\", gnuPGSourcePath)\n   188\u2192\t\t\t\tadded, removed, err := gpg.SyncKeyRingFromDirectory(gnuPGSourcePath)\n   189\u2192\t\t\t\terrors.CheckError(err)\n   190\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Infof(\"Loaded %d (and removed %d) keys from keyring\", len(added), len(removed))\n   191\u2192\n   192\u2192\t\t\t\tgo func() { errors.CheckError(reposerver.StartGPGWatcher(gnuPGSourcePath)) }()\n   193\u2192\t\t\t}\n   194\u2192\n   195\u2192\t\t\tlog.Infof(\"argocd-repo-server is listening on %s\", listener.Addr())\n   196\u2192\t\t\tstats.RegisterStackDumper()\n   197\u2192\t\t\tstats.StartStatsTicker(10 * time.Minute)\n   198\u2192\t\t\tstats.RegisterHeapDumper(\"memprofile\")\n   199\u2192\n   200\u2192\t\t\t// Graceful shutdown code adapted from https://gist.github.com/embano1/e0bf49d24f1cdd07cffad93097c04f0a\n   201\u2192\t\t\tsigCh := make(chan os.Signal, 1)\n   202\u2192\t\t\tsignal.Notify(sigCh, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)\n   203\u2192\t\t\twg := sync.WaitGroup{}\n   204\u2192\t\t\twg.Add(1)\n   205\u2192\t\t\tgo func() {\n   206\u2192\t\t\t\ts := <-sigCh\n   207\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"got signal %v, attempting graceful shutdown\", s)\n   208\u2192\t\t\t\tgrpc.GracefulStop()\n   209\u2192\t\t\t\twg.Done()\n   210\u2192\t\t\t}()\n   211\u2192\n   212\u2192\t\t\tlog.Println(\"starting grpc server\")\n   213\u2192\t\t\terr = grpc.Serve(listener)\n   214\u2192\t\t\tif err != nil {\n   215\u2192\t\t\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"could not serve: %v\", err)\n   216\u2192\t\t\t}\n   217\u2192\t\t\twg.Wait()\n   218\u2192\t\t\tlog.Println(\"clean shutdown\")\n   219\u2192\n   220\u2192\t\t\treturn nil\n   221\u2192\t\t},\n   222\u2192\t}\n   223\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&cmdutil.LogFormat, \"logformat\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_LOGFORMAT\", \"text\"), \"Set the logging format. One of: text|json\")\n   224\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&cmdutil.LogLevel, \"loglevel\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_LOGLEVEL\", \"info\"), \"Set the logging level. One of: debug|info|warn|error\")\n   225\u2192\tcommand.Flags().Int64Var(&parallelismLimit, \"parallelismlimit\", int64(env.ParseNumFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_PARALLELISM_LIMIT\", 0, 0, math.MaxInt32)), \"Limit on number of concurrent manifests generate requests. Any value less the 1 means no limit.\")\n   226\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&listenHost, \"address\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_LISTEN_ADDRESS\", common.DefaultAddressRepoServer), \"Listen on given address for incoming connections\")\n   227\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&listenPort, \"port\", common.DefaultPortRepoServer, \"Listen on given port for incoming connections\")\n   228\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&metricsHost, \"metrics-address\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_METRICS_LISTEN_ADDRESS\", common.DefaultAddressRepoServerMetrics), \"Listen on given address for metrics\")\n   229\u2192\tcommand.Flags().IntVar(&metricsPort, \"metrics-port\", common.DefaultPortRepoServerMetrics, \"Start metrics server on given port\")\n   230\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&otlpAddress, \"otlp-address\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_OTLP_ADDRESS\", \"\"), \"OpenTelemetry collector address to send traces to\")\n   231\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&otlpInsecure, \"otlp-insecure\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_OTLP_INSECURE\", true), \"OpenTelemetry collector insecure mode\")\n   232\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringToStringVar(&otlpHeaders, \"otlp-headers\", env.ParseStringToStringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_OTLP_HEADERS\", map[string]string{}, \",\"), \"List of OpenTelemetry collector extra headers sent with traces, headers are comma-separated key-value pairs(e.g. key1=value1,key2=value2)\")\n   233\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringSliceVar(&otlpAttrs, \"otlp-attrs\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_OTLP_ATTRS\", []string{}, \",\"), \"List of OpenTelemetry collector extra attrs when send traces, each attribute is separated by a colon(e.g. key:value)\")\n   234\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&disableTLS, \"disable-tls\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_DISABLE_TLS\", false), \"Disable TLS on the gRPC endpoint\")\n   235\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&maxCombinedDirectoryManifestsSize, \"max-combined-directory-manifests-size\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_MAX_COMBINED_DIRECTORY_MANIFESTS_SIZE\", \"10M\"), \"Max combined size of manifest files in a directory-type Application\")\n   236\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringArrayVar(&cmpTarExcludedGlobs, \"plugin-tar-exclude\", env.StringsFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_PLUGIN_TAR_EXCLUSIONS\", []string{}, \";\"), \"Globs to filter when sending tarballs to plugins.\")\n   237\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&allowOutOfBoundsSymlinks, \"allow-oob-symlinks\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_ALLOW_OUT_OF_BOUNDS_SYMLINKS\", false), \"Allow out-of-bounds symlinks in repositories (not recommended)\")\n   238\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&streamedManifestMaxTarSize, \"streamed-manifest-max-tar-size\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_STREAMED_MANIFEST_MAX_TAR_SIZE\", \"100M\"), \"Maximum size of streamed manifest archives\")\n   239\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&streamedManifestMaxExtractedSize, \"streamed-manifest-max-extracted-size\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_STREAMED_MANIFEST_MAX_EXTRACTED_SIZE\", \"1G\"), \"Maximum size of streamed manifest archives when extracted\")\n   240\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&helmManifestMaxExtractedSize, \"helm-manifest-max-extracted-size\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_HELM_MANIFEST_MAX_EXTRACTED_SIZE\", \"1G\"), \"Maximum size of helm manifest archives when extracted\")\n   241\u2192\tcommand.Flags().StringVar(&helmRegistryMaxIndexSize, \"helm-registry-max-index-size\", env.StringFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_HELM_MANIFEST_MAX_INDEX_SIZE\", \"1G\"), \"Maximum size of registry index file\")\n   242\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&disableManifestMaxExtractedSize, \"disable-helm-manifest-max-extracted-size\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_DISABLE_HELM_MANIFEST_MAX_EXTRACTED_SIZE\", false), \"Disable maximum size of helm manifest archives when extracted\")\n   243\u2192\tcommand.Flags().BoolVar(&includeHiddenDirectories, \"include-hidden-directories\", env.ParseBoolFromEnv(\"ARGOCD_REPO_SERVER_INCLUDE_HIDDEN_DIRECTORIES\", false), \"Include hidden directories from Git\")\n   244\u2192\ttlsConfigCustomizerSrc = tls.AddTLSFlagsToCmd(&command)\n   245\u2192\tcacheSrc = reposervercache.AddCacheFlagsToCmd(&command, cacheutil.Options{\n   246\u2192\t\tOnClientCreated: func(client *redis.Client) {\n   247\u2192\t\t\tredisClient = client\n   248\u2192\t\t},\n   249\u2192\t})\n   250\u2192\treturn &command\n   251\u2192}\n   252\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. Output
"     1\u2192package settings\n     2\u2192\n     3\u2192import (\n     4\u2192\t\"context\"\n     5\u2192\t\"fmt\"\n     6\u2192\n     7\u2192\t\"github.com/golang/protobuf/ptypes/empty\"\n     8\u2192\t\"sigs.k8s.io/yaml\"\n     9\u2192\n    10\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/reposerver/apiclient\"\n    11\u2192\tioutil \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/io\"\n    12\u2192\n    13\u2192\tsessionmgr \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/session\"\n    14\u2192\n    15\u2192\tsettingspkg \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/pkg/apiclient/settings\"\n    16\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/pkg/apis/application/v1alpha1\"\n    17\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/settings\"\n    18\u2192)\n    19\u2192\n    20\u2192// Server provides a Settings service\n    21\u2192type Server struct {\n    22\u2192\tmgr                       *settings.SettingsManager\n    23\u2192\trepoClient                apiclient.Clientset\n    24\u2192\tauthenticator             Authenticator\n    25\u2192\tdisableAuth               bool\n    26\u2192\tappsInAnyNamespaceEnabled bool\n    27\u2192}\n    28\u2192\n    29\u2192type Authenticator interface {\n    30\u2192\tAuthenticate(ctx context.Context) (context.Context, error)\n    31\u2192}\n    32\u2192\n    33\u2192// NewServer returns a new instance of the Settings service\n    34\u2192func NewServer(mgr *settings.SettingsManager, repoClient apiclient.Clientset, authenticator Authenticator, disableAuth, appsInAnyNamespaceEnabled bool) *Server {\n    35\u2192\treturn &Server{mgr: mgr, repoClient: repoClient, authenticator: authenticator, disableAuth: disableAuth, appsInAnyNamespaceEnabled: appsInAnyNamespaceEnabled}\n    36\u2192}\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192// Get returns Argo CD settings\n    39\u2192func (s *Server) Get(ctx context.Context, q *settingspkg.SettingsQuery) (*settingspkg.Settings, error) {\n    40\u2192\tresourceOverrides, err := s.mgr.GetResourceOverrides()\n    41\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    42\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    43\u2192\t}\n    44\u2192\toverrides := make(map[string]*v1alpha1.ResourceOverride)\n    45\u2192\tfor k := range resourceOverrides {\n    46\u2192\t\tval := resourceOverrides[k]\n    47\u2192\t\toverrides[k] = &val\n    48\u2192\t}\n    49\u2192\tappInstanceLabelKey, err := s.mgr.GetAppInstanceLabelKey()\n    50\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    51\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    52\u2192\t}\n    53\u2192\targoCDSettings, err := s.mgr.GetSettings()\n    54\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    55\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    56\u2192\t}\n    57\u2192\tgaSettings, err := s.mgr.GetGoogleAnalytics()\n    58\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    59\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    60\u2192\t}\n    61\u2192\thelp, err := s.mgr.GetHelp()\n    62\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    63\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    64\u2192\t}\n    65\u2192\tuserLoginsDisabled := true\n    66\u2192\taccounts, err := s.mgr.GetAccounts()\n    67\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    68\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    69\u2192\t}\n    70\u2192\tfor _, account := range accounts {\n    71\u2192\t\tif account.Enabled && account.HasCapability(settings.AccountCapabilityLogin) {\n    72\u2192\t\t\tuserLoginsDisabled = false\n    73\u2192\t\t\tbreak\n    74\u2192\t\t}\n    75\u2192\t}\n    76\u2192\n    77\u2192\tkustomizeSettings, err := s.mgr.GetKustomizeSettings()\n    78\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    79\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    80\u2192\t}\n    81\u2192\tvar kustomizeVersions []string\n    82\u2192\tfor i := range kustomizeSettings.Versions {\n    83\u2192\t\tkustomizeVersions = append(kustomizeVersions, kustomizeSettings.Versions[i].Name)\n    84\u2192\t}\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192\ttrackingMethod, err := s.mgr.GetTrackingMethod()\n    87\u2192\tif err != nil {\n    88\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n    89\u2192\t}\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192\tset := settingspkg.Settings{\n    92\u2192\t\tURL:                argoCDSettings.URL,\n    93\u2192\t\tAppLabelKey:        appInstanceLabelKey,\n    94\u2192\t\tResourceOverrides:  overrides,\n    95\u2192\t\tStatusBadgeEnabled: argoCDSettings.StatusBadgeEnabled,\n    96\u2192\t\tStatusBadgeRootUrl: argoCDSettings.StatusBadgeRootUrl,\n    97\u2192\t\tKustomizeOptions: &v1alpha1.KustomizeOptions{\n    98\u2192\t\t\tBuildOptions: argoCDSettings.KustomizeBuildOptions,\n    99\u2192\t\t},\n   100\u2192\t\tGoogleAnalytics: &settingspkg.GoogleAnalyticsConfig{\n   101\u2192\t\t\tTrackingID:     gaSettings.TrackingID,\n   102\u2192\t\t\tAnonymizeUsers: gaSettings.AnonymizeUsers,\n   103\u2192\t\t},\n   104\u2192\t\tHelp: &settingspkg.Help{\n   105\u2192\t\t\tChatUrl:    help.ChatURL,\n   106\u2192\t\t\tChatText:   help.ChatText,\n   107\u2192\t\t\tBinaryUrls: help.BinaryURLs,\n   108\u2192\t\t},\n   109\u2192\t\tUserLoginsDisabled:        userLoginsDisabled,\n   110\u2192\t\tKustomizeVersions:         kustomizeVersions,\n   111\u2192\t\tUiCssURL:                  argoCDSettings.UiCssURL,\n   112\u2192\t\tTrackingMethod:            trackingMethod,\n   113\u2192\t\tExecEnabled:               argoCDSettings.ExecEnabled,\n   114\u2192\t\tAppsInAnyNamespaceEnabled: s.appsInAnyNamespaceEnabled,\n   115\u2192\t\tImpersonationEnabled:      argoCDSettings.ImpersonationEnabled,\n   116\u2192\t}\n   117\u2192\n   118\u2192\tif sessionmgr.LoggedIn(ctx) || s.disableAuth {\n   119\u2192\t\tset.UiBannerContent = argoCDSettings.UiBannerContent\n   120\u2192\t\tset.UiBannerURL = argoCDSettings.UiBannerURL\n   121\u2192\t\tset.UiBannerPermanent = argoCDSettings.UiBannerPermanent\n   122\u2192\t\tset.UiBannerPosition = argoCDSettings.UiBannerPosition\n   123\u2192\t\tset.ControllerNamespace = s.mgr.GetNamespace()\n   124\u2192\t}\n   125\u2192\tif sessionmgr.LoggedIn(ctx) {\n   126\u2192\t\tset.PasswordPattern = argoCDSettings.PasswordPattern\n   127\u2192\t}\n   128\u2192\tif argoCDSettings.DexConfig != \"\" {\n   129\u2192\t\tvar cfg settingspkg.DexConfig\n   130\u2192\t\terr = yaml.Unmarshal([]byte(argoCDSettings.DexConfig), &cfg)\n   131\u2192\t\tif err == nil {\n   132\u2192\t\t\tset.DexConfig = &cfg\n   133\u2192\t\t}\n   134\u2192\t}\n   135\u2192\tif oidcConfig := argoCDSettings.OIDCConfig(); oidcConfig != nil {\n   136\u2192\t\tset.OIDCConfig = &settingspkg.OIDCConfig{\n   137\u2192\t\t\tName:                     oidcConfig.Name,\n   138\u2192\t\t\tIssuer:                   oidcConfig.Issuer,\n   139\u2192\t\t\tClientID:                 oidcConfig.ClientID,\n   140\u2192\t\t\tCLIClientID:              oidcConfig.CLIClientID,\n   141\u2192\t\t\tScopes:                   oidcConfig.RequestedScopes,\n   142\u2192\t\t\tEnablePKCEAuthentication: oidcConfig.EnablePKCEAuthentication,\n   143\u2192\t\t}\n   144\u2192\t\tif len(argoCDSettings.OIDCConfig().RequestedIDTokenClaims) > 0 {\n   145\u2192\t\t\tset.OIDCConfig.IDTokenClaims = argoCDSettings.OIDCConfig().RequestedIDTokenClaims\n   146\u2192\t\t}\n   147\u2192\t}\n   148\u2192\treturn &set, nil\n   149\u2192}\n   150\u2192\n   151\u2192// GetPlugins returns a list of plugins\n   152\u2192func (s *Server) GetPlugins(ctx context.Context, q *settingspkg.SettingsQuery) (*settingspkg.SettingsPluginsResponse, error) {\n   153\u2192\tplugins, err := s.plugins(ctx)\n   154\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   155\u2192\t\treturn nil, err\n   156\u2192\t}\n   157\u2192\treturn &settingspkg.SettingsPluginsResponse{Plugins: plugins}, nil\n   158\u2192}\n   159\u2192\n   160\u2192func (s *Server) plugins(ctx context.Context) ([]*settingspkg.Plugin, error) {\n   161\u2192\tcloser, client, err := s.repoClient.NewRepoServerClient()\n   162\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   163\u2192\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"error creating repo server client: %w\", err)\n   164\u2192\t}\n   165\u2192\tdefer ioutil.Close(closer)\n   166\u2192\n   167\u2192\tpluginList, err := client.ListPlugins(ctx, &empty.Empty{})\n   168\u2192\tif err != nil {\n   169\u2192\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"failed to list sidecar plugins from reposerver: %w\", err)\n   170\u2192\t}\n   171\u2192\n   172\u2192\tvar out []*settingspkg.Plugin\n   173\u2192\tif pluginList != nil && len(pluginList.Items) > 0 {\n   174\u2192\t\tfor _, p := range pluginList.Items {\n   175\u2192\t\t\tout = append(out, &settingspkg.Plugin{Name: p.Name})\n   176\u2192\t\t}\n   177\u2192\t}\n   178\u2192\n   179\u2192\treturn out, nil\n   180\u2192}\n   181\u2192\n   182\u2192// AuthFuncOverride disables authentication for settings service\n   183\u2192func (s *Server) AuthFuncOverride(ctx context.Context, fullMethodName string) (context.Context, error) {\n   184\u2192\tctx, err := s.authenticator.Authenticate(ctx)\n   185\u2192\tif fullMethodName == \"/cluster.SettingsService/Get\" {\n   186\u2192\t\t// SettingsService/Get API is used by login page.\n   187\u2192\t\t// This authenticates the user, but ignores any error, so that we have claims populated\n   188\u2192\t\terr = nil\n   189\u2192\t}\n   190\u2192\treturn ctx, err\n   191\u2192}\n   192\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

  "limit": 100

"     1\u2192package settings\n     2\u2192\n     3\u2192import (\n     4\u2192\t\"context\"\n     5\u2192\t\"crypto/rand\"\n     6\u2192\t\"crypto/sha256\"\n     7\u2192\t\"crypto/tls\"\n     8\u2192\t\"crypto/x509\"\n     9\u2192\t\"encoding/base64\"\n    10\u2192\t\"errors\"\n    11\u2192\t\"fmt\"\n    12\u2192\t\"math/big\"\n    13\u2192\t\"net/http\"\n    14\u2192\t\"net/url\"\n    15\u2192\t\"path\"\n    16\u2192\t\"reflect\"\n    17\u2192\t\"strconv\"\n    18\u2192\t\"strings\"\n    19\u2192\t\"sync\"\n    20\u2192\t\"time\"\n    21\u2192\n    22\u2192\tlog \"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n    23\u2192\tapiv1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n    24\u2192\tapierr \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\"\n    25\u2192\tapierrors \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\"\n    26\u2192\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n    27\u2192\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/fields\"\n    28\u2192\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/labels\"\n    29\u2192\tv1 \"k8s.io/client-go/informers/core/v1\"\n    30\u2192\t\"k8s.io/client-go/kubernetes\"\n    31\u2192\tv1listers \"k8s.io/client-go/listers/core/v1\"\n    32\u2192\t\"k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache\"\n    33\u2192\t\"sigs.k8s.io/yaml\"\n    34\u2192\n    35\u2192\tenginecache \"github.com/argoproj/gitops-engine/pkg/cache\"\n    36\u2192\ttimeutil \"github.com/argoproj/pkg/time\"\n    37\u2192\n    38\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/common\"\n    39\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/pkg/apis/application/v1alpha1\"\n    40\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/server/settings/oidc\"\n    41\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util\"\n    42\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/crypto\"\n    43\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/kube\"\n    44\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/password\"\n    45\u2192\ttlsutil \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/tls\"\n    46\u2192)\n    47\u2192\n    48\u2192// ArgoCDSettings holds in-memory runtime configuration options.\n    49\u2192type ArgoCDSettings struct {\n    50\u2192\t// URL is the externally facing URL users will visit to reach Argo CD.\n    51\u2192\t// The value here is used when configuring SSO. Omitting this value will disable SSO.\n    52\u2192\tURL string `json:\"url,omitempty\"`\n    53\u2192\t// URLs is a list of externally facing URLs users will visit to reach Argo CD.\n    54\u2192\t// The value here is used when configuring SSO reachable from multiple domains.\n    55\u2192\tAdditionalURLs []string `json:\"additionalUrls,omitempty\"`\n    56\u2192\t// Indicates if status badge is enabled or not.\n    57\u2192\tStatusBadgeEnabled bool `json:\"statusBadgeEnable\"`\n    58\u2192\t// Indicates if status badge custom root URL should be used.\n    59\u2192\tStatusBadgeRootUrl string `json:\"statusBadgeRootUrl,omitempty\"`\n    60\u2192\t// DexConfig contains portions of a dex config yaml\n    61\u2192\tDexConfig string `json:\"dexConfig,omitempty\"`\n    62\u2192\t// OIDCConfigRAW holds OIDC configuration as a raw string\n    63\u2192\tOIDCConfigRAW string `json:\"oidcConfig,omitempty\"`\n    64\u2192\t// ServerSignature holds the key used to generate JWT tokens.\n    65\u2192\tServerSignature []byte `json:\"serverSignature,omitempty\"`\n    66\u2192\t// Certificate holds the certificate/private key for the Argo CD API server.\n    67\u2192\t// If nil, will run insecure without TLS.\n    68\u2192\tCertificate *tls.Certificate `json:\"-\"`\n    69\u2192\t// CertificateIsExternal indicates whether Certificate was loaded from external secret\n    70\u2192\tCertificateIsExternal bool `json:\"-\"`\n    71\u2192\t// WebhookGitLabSecret holds the shared secret for authenticating GitHub webhook events\n    72\u2192\tWebhookGitHubSecret string `json:\"webhookGitHubSecret,omitempty\"`\n    73\u2192\t// WebhookGitLabSecret holds the shared secret for authenticating GitLab webhook events\n    74\u2192\tWebhookGitLabSecret string `json:\"webhookGitLabSecret,omitempty\"`\n    75\u2192\t// WebhookBitbucketUUID holds the UUID for authenticating Bitbucket webhook events\n    76\u2192\tWebhookBitbucketUUID string `json:\"webhookBitbucketUUID,omitempty\"`\n    77\u2192\t// WebhookBitbucketServerSecret holds the shared secret for authenticating BitbucketServer webhook events\n    78\u2192\tWebhookBitbucketServerSecret string `json:\"webhookBitbucketServerSecret,omitempty\"`\n    79\u2192\t// WebhookGogsSecret holds the shared secret for authenticating Gogs webhook events\n    80\u2192\tWebhookGogsSecret string `json:\"webhookGogsSecret,omitempty\"`\n    81\u2192\t// WebhookAzureDevOpsUsername holds the username for authenticating Azure DevOps webhook events\n    82\u2192\tWebhookAzureDevOpsUsername string `json:\"webhookAzureDevOpsUsername,omitempty\"`\n    83\u2192\t// WebhookAzureDevOpsPassword holds the password for authenticating Azure DevOps webhook events\n    84\u2192\tWebhookAzureDevOpsPassword string `json:\"webhookAzureDevOpsPassword,omitempty\"`\n    85\u2192\t// Secrets holds all secrets in argocd-secret as a map[string]string\n    86\u2192\tSecrets map[string]string `json:\"secrets,omitempty\"`\n    87\u2192\t// KustomizeBuildOptions is a string of kustomize build parameters\n    88\u2192\tKustomizeBuildOptions string `json:\"kustomizeBuildOptions,omitempty\"`\n    89\u2192\t// Indicates if anonymous user is enabled or not\n    90\u2192\tAnonymousUserEnabled bool `json:\"anonymousUserEnabled,omitempty\"`\n    91\u2192\t// Specifies token expiration duration\n    92\u2192\tUserSessionDuration time.Duration `json:\"userSessionDuration,omitempty\"`\n    93\u2192\t// UiCssURL local or remote path to user-defined CSS to customize ArgoCD UI\n    94\u2192\tUiCssURL string `json:\"uiCssURL,omitempty\"`\n    95\u2192\t// Content of UI Banner\n    96\u2192\tUiBannerContent string `json:\"uiBannerContent,omitempty\"`\n    97\u2192\t// URL for UI Banner\n    98\u2192\tUiBannerURL string `json:\"uiBannerURL,omitempty\"`\n    99\u2192\t// Make Banner permanent and not closeable\n   100\u2192\tUiBannerPermanent bool `json:\"uiBannerPermanent,omitempty\"`\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

{
  "pattern": "/workspace/util/env/*.go"
}
Output
