"package e2e\n\nimport (\n\t\"context\"\n\t\"fmt\"\n\t\"os\"\n\t\"path\"\n\t\"reflect\"\n\t\"testing\"\n\t\"time\"\n\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/gitops-engine/pkg/diff\"\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/gitops-engine/pkg/health\"\n\t. \"github.com/argoproj/gitops-engine/pkg/sync/common\"\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/gitops-engine/pkg/utils/kube\"\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/pkg/errors\"\n\tlog \"github.com/sirupsen/logrus\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/assert\"\n\t\"github.com/stretchr/testify/require\"\n\tv1 \"k8s.io/api/core/v1\"\n\tnetworkingv1 \"k8s.io/api/networking/v1\"\n\tmetav1 \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/apis/meta/v1\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime/schema\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/types\"\n\t\"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/util/intstr\"\n\t\"k8s.io/utils/ptr\"\n\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/common\"\n\tapplicationpkg \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/pkg/apiclient/application\"\n\t. \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/pkg/apis/application/v1alpha1\"\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/test/e2e/fixture\"\n\t. \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/test/e2e/fixture\"\n\taccountFixture \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/test/e2e/fixture/account\"\n\t. \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/test/e2e/fixture/app\"\n\tprojectFixture \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/test/e2e/fixture/project\"\n\trepoFixture \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/test/e2e/fixture/repos\"\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/test/e2e/testdata\"\n\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/pkg/apis/application\"\n\t. \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/argo\"\n\t. \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/errors\"\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/io\"\n\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/settings\"\n)\n\n// This empty test is here only for clarity, to conform to logs rbac tests structure in account. This exact usecase is covered in the TestAppLogs test\nfunc TestNamespacedGetLogsAllowNoSwitch(t *testing.T) {\n}\n\nfunc TestNamespacedGetLogsDenySwitchOn(t *testing.T) {"
148. Task @ -
Input
{
  "description": "Trace application sync pipeline architecture",
  "prompt": "Trace the complete Application sync pipeline from CRD to deployment:\n1. Find Application CRD definition - where are the types defined?\n2. Where does the Application controller start reconciliation?\n3. What are the main stages of the sync process?\n4. How does the controller interact with repo-server to get manifests?\n5. How does the controller diff and sync resources?\n6. What is the state machine during sync?\n7. Find key packages/files in the pipeline:\n   - CRD types (apis/application)\n   - Controller reconciliation loop (controller/appcontroller.go)\n   - State management (controller/state.go)\n   - Sync logic (controller/sync.go)\n   - Resource management (util/argo/*)\n   - Diff/normalizers (util/argo/diff)\n\nCreate a diagram showing the flow from CRD -> Controller -> RepoServer -> Diff -> Sync -> kubectl apply",
  "subagent_type": "Explore"
}
Output
{
  "agentId": "aea6d13c4dfc65359",
  "content": [
    {
      "text": "Perfect! Now I have all the information I need to create a comprehensive analysis. Let me compile everything together.\n\n## Comprehensive Application Sync Pipeline Analysis\n\nBased on my analysis of the Argo CD codebase (v2.13.2), here's the complete Application sync pipeline from CRD to deployment:\n\n### 1. CRD Type Definitions\n\n**Location:** `/workspace/pkg/apis/application/v1alpha1/types.go`\n\nThe Application CRD is defined with these key structures:\n\n```\nApplication CRD\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 Spec (ApplicationSpec)\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Source/Sources: ApplicationSource (git repo reference)\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Destination: ApplicationDestination (target cluster/namespace)\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Project: AppProject reference\n\u2502   \u2514\u2500\u2500 SyncPolicy: Controls automatic syncing\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 Status (ApplicationStatus)\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Sync: SyncStatus (Synced/OutOfSync/Unknown)\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Health: HealthStatus (Healthy/Degraded/Unknown)\n\u2502   \u251c\u2500\u2500 Resources: []ResourceStatus (managed resources)\n\u2502   \u2514\u2500\u2500 OperationState: Current operation status\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 Operation: Requested operation (Sync, Rollback, etc.)\n```\n\n### 2. Controller Reconciliation Entry Points\n\n**Location:** `/workspace/controller/appcontroller.go`\n\nThe ApplicationController reconciles through two main queues:\n\n```\nappRefreshQueue (Status Reconciliation)\n  \u2514\u2500> processAppRefreshQueueItem()\n      \u2514\u2500> Runs status refresh periodically based on needRefreshAppStatus()\n\nappOperationQueue (Sync Operations)\n  \u2514\u2500> processAppOperationQueueItem()\n      \u2514\u2500> Processes user-requested sync operations\n```\n\n### 3. Main Reconciliation Loop - Status Refresh\n\n**Method:** `processAppRefreshQueueItem()` (line 1541 in appcontroller.go)\n\n```\nStatus Refresh Cycle:\n1. Check needRefreshAppStatus() - determines comparison level:\n   - ComparisonWithNothing (0): Just update resource tree\n   - CompareWithRecent (1): Compare with cached revision\n   - CompareWithLatest (2): Compare with latest in git\n   - CompareWithLatestForceResolve (3): Force re-resolve git ref\n\n2. refreshAppConditions() - validate application config\n\n3. CompareAppState() [State Manager]\n   \u251c\u2500> GetRepoObjs() - Fetch target manifests from repo-server\n   \u251c\u2500> liveStateCache.GetManagedLiveObjs() - Get live cluster state\n   \u251c\u2500> sync.Reconcile() [gitops-engine] - Match live and target\n   \u2514\u2500> Calculate diff and sync status\n\n4. setAppManagedResources() - Update status.resources\n\n5. persistAppStatus() - Patch Application CR with new status\n```\n\n### 4. State Manager - CompareAppState Implementation\n\n**Location:** `/workspace/controller/state.go` (line 429)\n\n```\nCompareAppState Pipeline:\n\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 1. Load Comparison Settings                                      \u2502\n\u2502    - AppLabelKey, ResourceOverrides, ResourceFilters             \u2502\n\u2502    - Enable source types, Helm repos, credentials                \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 2. Get Target Objects from Repo-Server                           \u2502\n\u2502    - GetRepoObjs() via gRPC to repo-server                       \u2502\n\u2502    - Supports: Helm, Kustomize, Directory, Plugin               \u2502\n\u2502    - Returns: Unstructured manifests + revision info             \u2502\n\u2502    - Caches manifests based on revision                          \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 3. Get Live Objects from Cluster Cache                           \u2502\n\u2502    - liveStateCache.GetManagedLiveObjs()                         \u2502\n\u2502    - Filters by app's resource tracking labels                   \u2502\n\u2502    - Validates RBAC permissions                                  \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 4. Reconcile (Match Target + Live)                               \u2502\n\u2502    - sync.Reconcile() [from gitops-engine]                       \u2502\n\u2502    - Creates ReconciliationResult with aligned lists             \u2502\n\u2502    - Deduplicates resources                                      \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 5. Diff Calculation                                              \u2502\n\u2502    - argodiff.StateDiffs()                                       \u2502\n\u2502    - For each target/live pair:                                  \u2502\n\u2502      * Normalize both (remove fields Argo doesn't manage)        \u2502\n\u2502      * Compute diff (JSON, 3-way merge, or server-side)         \u2502\n\u2502    - Apply Ignore Differences config                             \u2502\n\u2502    - Result: DiffResultList with Modified flag per resource      \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 6. Compute Sync Status                                           \u2502\n\u2502    - For each resource:                                          \u2502\n\u2502      * If diff.Modified OR target==nil OR live==nil             \u2502\n\u2502        \u2514\u2500> SyncStatusCodeOutOfSync                              \u2502\n\u2502      * Else                                                       \u2502\n\u2502        \u2514\u2500> SyncStatusCodeSynced                                  \u2502\n\u2502    - Overall: OutOfSync if ANY resource OutOfSync               \u2502\n\u2502    - Health: From liveStateCache health evaluation               \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 7. Return comparisonResult                                       \u2502\n\u2502    \u251c\u2500 syncStatus: SyncStatus (Synced/OutOfSync/Unknown)         \u2502\n\u2502    \u251c\u2500 healthStatus: HealthStatus                                 \u2502\n\u2502    \u251c\u2500 resources: []ResourceStatus                                \u2502\n\u2502    \u251c\u2500 managedResources: For sync phase                          \u2502\n\u2502    \u2514\u2500 reconciliationResult: For sync execution                   \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n```\n\n### 5. Diff Details\n\n**Location:** `/workspace/util/argo/diff/diff.go`\n\nThe diff system has multiple modes:\n\n```\nDiffConfig (Configurable)\n\u251c\u2500 Normalizers\n\u2502  \u251c\u2500 KnownTypes Normalizer (corev1_known_types.go)\n\u2502  \u2514\u2500 Diff Normalizer (diff_normalizer.go)\n\u251c\u2500 IgnoreDifferences - paths to ignore\n\u251c\u2500 ResourceOverrides - system-level customization\n\u251c\u2500 TrackingMethod - label/annotation/both\n\u2514\u2500 ServerSideDiff - use kubectl server-side dry-run\n\nStateDiffs Algorithm:\n1. If serverSideDiff enabled:\n   \u2514\u2500> Use kubectl server-side dry-run to predict live after apply\n2. Else:\n   \u251c\u2500> Apply 3-way merge (local/live/target)\n   \u251c\u2500> Normalize live and predicted\n   \u251c\u2500> Compare\n   \u2514\u2500> Return diff\n\nNormalization:\n- Removes Kubernetes internals (metadata.managedFields, etc.)\n- Ignores fields configured in ignoreDifferences\n- Applies resource overrides\n```\n\n### 6. Sync Operation Pipeline\n\n**Location:** `/workspace/controller/sync.go` (line 90)\n\nWhen `app.operation.sync` is set (user-initiated or auto-sync):\n\n```\nSyncAppState() Flow:\n\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 1. Initialize Sync                                        \u2502\n\u2502    - Get operation from operationState                    \u2502\n\u2502    - Determine if rollback or normal sync                 \u2502\n\u2502    - Set revision to sync to (or use request revision)    \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 2. Validate Sync Window                                   \u2502\n\u2502    - Check syncWindows in AppProject                      \u2502\n\u2502    - If blocked, return OperationRunning (retry later)   \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 3. Re-compare to Get Sync Targets                        \u2502\n\u2502    - Call CompareAppState with noRevisionCache=true      \u2502\n\u2502    - Ensures concrete revision SHA in syncResult         \u2502\n\u2502    - Return reconciliationResult (target manifest list)  \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 4. Prepare Sync Context                                  \u2502\n\u2502    - Get OpenAPI schema from cluster                     \u2502\n\u2502    - Get REST config (with impersonation if enabled)     \u2502\n\u2502    - Parse sync options (DryRun, Prune, Force, etc.)    \u2502\n\u2502    - Apply normalizations if RespectIgnoreDifferences    \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 5. Execute Sync via gitops-engine                        \u2502\n\u2502    sync.NewSyncContext()                                 \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Options: Dry-run, Prune, Force, SSA, etc.       \u2502\n\u2502      \u2514\u2500 Resources Filter by project RBAC                 \u2502\n\u2502                                                           \u2502\n\u2502    syncCtx.Sync() (or Terminate() if terminating)       \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Phase 1: Create/Replace resources                \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Phase 2: Sync waves (parallel within wave)       \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Phase 3: Prune resources if enabled              \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Phase 4: Post-delete hooks                       \u2502\n\u2502      \u2514\u2500 Hook phases interspersed                         \u2502\n\u2502                                                           \u2502\n\u2502    GetState() returns:                                    \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Phase: Succeeded/Failed/Error/Terminating        \u2502\n\u2502      \u251c\u2500 Message: Status message                          \u2502\n\u2502      \u2514\u2500 Resources: []ResourceSyncResult per resource     \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n           \u2193\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502 6. Update Operation State                                 \u2502\n\u2502    - Set phase, message, resources results               \u2502\n\u2502    - Update status.operationState                        \u2502\n\u2502    - For auto-sync: trigger app refresh                  \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n```\n\n### 7. State Machine Phases\n\n**OperationPhase values** (from gitops-engine):\n\n```\nPending       \u2192 Initial state, waiting to start\nRunning       \u2192 Sync in progress\nSuccess       \u2192 Completed successfully\nFailed        \u2192 Completed with failures\nError         \u2192 Operational error (config/permissions)\nTerminating   \u2192 User requested termination\nTerminated    \u2192 Termination completed\n```\n\n**ResourceSyncResult per resource:**\n\n```\nStatus: Synced / OutOfSync / Unknown / SyncFailed\nPhase: PreSync / Sync / PostSync / SyncFailed\nHookType: PreSync / PostSync (if applicable)\nHookPhase: Pending / Running / Success / Failed\nMessage: Human-readable result\n```\n\n### 8. Key Packages and File Locations\n\n| Component | Path | Purpose |\n|-----------|------|---------|\n| **CRD Types** | `/workspace/pkg/apis/application/v1alpha1/types.go` | Application, ApplicationStatus, Operation, SyncStatus |\n| **Controller** | `/workspace/controller/appcontroller.go` | Main controller reconciliation loops (refresh + operation queues) |\n| **State Manager** | `/workspace/controller/state.go` | CompareAppState implementation (comparison/diff logic) |\n| **Sync Logic** | `/workspace/controller/sync.go` | SyncAppState implementation (kubectl execution) |\n| **Diff Engine** | `/workspace/util/argo/diff/diff.go` | DiffConfig, StateDiffs, diff caching |\n| **Normalizers** | `/workspace/util/argo/normalizers/` | Resource normalization for diffing |\n| **Managed Fields** | `/workspace/util/argo/managedfields/` | Structured merge patch support |\n| **Repo-server Client** | `/workspace/reposerver/apiclient/` | gRPC client for manifest generation |\n| **Resource Tracking** | `/workspace/util/argo/resource_tracking.go` | Label-based ownership tracking |\n| **Audit Logging** | `/workspace/util/argo/audit_logger.go` | Sync operation audit trail |\n\n### 9. Complete Flow Diagram\n\n```\n\u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n\u2502                         APPLICATION CRD CREATED/UPDATED                       \u2502\n\u2502  (app.spec.source, app.spec.destination, app.spec.syncPolicy, etc.)         \u2502\n\u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u252c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                                 \u2193\n                    \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n                    \u2502 ApplicationController       \u2502\n                    \u2502 (controller/appcontroller) \u2502\n                    \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u252c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                                     \u2193\n        \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n        \u2502 Watches Application events via Informer            \u2502\n        \u2502 Enqueues app into appRefreshQueue periodically    \u2502\n        \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u252c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                         \u2193\n        \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n        \u2502 processAppRefreshQueueItem()                        \u2502\n        \u2502 1. Check needRefreshAppStatus()                    \u2502\n        \u2502 2. refreshAppConditions() - validate config        \u2502\n        \u2502 3. appStateManager.CompareAppState()              \u2502\n        \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u252c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                         \u2193\n        \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n        \u2502 appStateManager.CompareAppState()                  \u2502\n        \u2502 [state.go:429]                                     \u2502\n        \u2502                                                    \u2502\n        \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 GetRepoObjs() - gRPC to repo-server         \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 manifest request with app source         \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 repo-server generates manifests          \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u2502  (Helm, Kustomize, Directory, Plugin)    \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 returns unstructured objects + revision  \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 \u2502\n        \u2502                   \u2193                                \u2502\n        \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 Get Live Objects from Cluster Cache          \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 liveStateCache.GetManagedLiveObjs()      \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 filter by resource tracking labels       \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 validate RBAC permissions                \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 \u2502\n        \u2502                   \u2193                                \u2502\n        \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 Reconcile (gitops-engine)                    \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 sync.Reconcile(targetObjs, liveObjs)    \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 returns ReconciliationResult             \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 \u2502\n        \u2502                   \u2193                                \u2502\n        \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 Diff Calculation                             \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 argodiff.StateDiffs()                    \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Normalize resources                       \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Compare target vs live                    \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u2502  (3-way merge or server-side)             \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 Apply ignoreDifferences config           \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 \u2502\n        \u2502                   \u2193                                \u2502\n        \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 Compute Sync Status                          \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Per resource: Synced or OutOfSync        \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Overall: OutOfSync if ANY differ         \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 Health status from cluster cache         \u2502 \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518 \u2502\n        \u2502                   \u2193                                \u2502\n        \u2502 Return: comparisonResult {                        \u2502\n        \u2502   syncStatus, healthStatus, resources,           \u2502\n        \u2502   managedResources, reconciliationResult          \u2502\n        \u2502 }                                                 \u2502\n        \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u252c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                         \u2193\n        \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n        \u2502 Back in processAppRefreshQueueItem():             \u2502\n        \u2502 1. setAppManagedResources() - update tree         \u2502\n        \u2502 2. persistAppStatus() - patch CR with status      \u2502\n        \u2502 3. Cache results for next cycle                   \u2502\n        \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u252c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                         \u2193\n        \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n        \u2502 Application.Status Updated                         \u2502\n        \u2502 \u251c\u2500 sync.status: Synced / OutOfSync / Unknown       \u2502\n        \u2502 \u251c\u2500 health.status: Healthy / Degraded / Unknown    \u2502\n        \u2502 \u251c\u2500 resources: []ResourceStatus                     \u2502\n        \u2502 \u2514\u2500 summary: image/URL summary                      \u2502\n        \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u252c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                         \u2193\n            \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n            \u2502 Is app OutOfSync?          \u2502\n            \u2502 AND auto-sync enabled?     \u2502\n            \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u252c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                         \u251c\u2500 NO \u2500\u2500\u2192 End (wait for next cycle)\n                         \u2502\n                         \u2514\u2500 YES \u2500\u2500\u2192 Set operation.sync\n                                   Enqueue appOperationQueue\n                                        \u2193\n              \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n              \u2502 processAppOperationQueueItem()              \u2502\n              \u2502 [appcontroller.go:934]                      \u2502\n              \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u252c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                            \u2193\n              \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n              \u2502 appStateManager.SyncAppState()              \u2502\n              \u2502 [sync.go:90]                                \u2502\n              \u2502                                             \u2502\n              \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 1. Validate Sync Windows               \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Check AppProject sync windows       \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 If blocked, return (retry later)    \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\u2502\n              \u2502                   \u2193                         \u2502\n              \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 2. Re-compare to get concrete revision \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 CompareAppState(noRevisionCache)   \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 Get reconciliationResult            \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\u2502\n              \u2502                   \u2193                         \u2502\n              \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 3. Prepare Sync Context                \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Get cluster REST config             \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Get OpenAPI schema                  \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Parse sync options                  \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2502  (DryRun, Prune, Force, SSA, etc.)   \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 Filter resources by RBAC            \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\u2502\n              \u2502                   \u2193                         \u2502\n              \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 4. Execute Sync (gitops-engine)       \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 sync.NewSyncContext()               \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 syncCtx.Sync()                      \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2502  \u251c\u2500 Sync wave phases                 \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2502  \u251c\u2500 kubectl apply (or server-side)   \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2502  \u251c\u2500 Prune if enabled                 \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2502  \u2514\u2500 Post-delete hooks                \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 GetState() \u2192 phase, resources       \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\u2502\n              \u2502                   \u2193                         \u2502\n              \u2502 \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 5. Update OperationState                \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Set phase (Success/Failed/Error)    \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Set message                         \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Record resources results            \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502 \u2514\u2500 Record finish time                  \u2502\u2502\n              \u2502 \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\u2502\n              \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                            \u2193\n              \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n              \u2502 Application.Status.OperationState Updated   \u2502\n              \u2502 \u251c\u2500 phase: Succeeded / Failed / Error        \u2502\n              \u2502 \u251c\u2500 message: Result message                  \u2502\n              \u2502 \u251c\u2500 resources: []ResourceSyncResult          \u2502\n              \u2502 \u2502  (per-resource status, phase, message)   \u2502\n              \u2502 \u2514\u2500 finishedAt: Completion time              \u2502\n              \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n                            \u2193\n              \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510\n              \u2502 Trigger next status refresh                 \u2502\n              \u2502 \u251c\u2500 Enqueue appRefreshQueue again           \u2502\n              \u2502 \u2514\u2500 Recalculate sync/health status          \u2502\n              \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518\n```\n\n### 10. Key Sync State Transitions\n\n```\nNormal Sync Flow (Healthy App):\n  OutOfSync \u2192 [user triggers sync] \u2192 OperationPending \n    \u2192 OperationRunning \u2192 OperationSucceeded \n    \u2192 Synced (after next refresh)\n\nAuto-Sync Flow:\n  OutOfSync \u2192 (app controller detects & auto-syncs)\n    \u2192 OperationPending \u2192 OperationRunning \n    \u2192 OperationSucceeded \u2192 Synced\n\nRetry Flow (Failed Sync):\n  OutOfSync \u2192 OperationRunning \u2192 OperationFailed \n    \u2192 (retry with backoff) \u2192 OperationRunning \n    \u2192 OperationSucceeded \u2192 Synced\n\nFailure States:\n  ComparisonError \u2192 status Unknown (can't determine state)\n  SyncError \u2192 OperationFailed (explicit failure)\n  InvalidSpec \u2192 OperationError (bad config)\n```\n\n### 11. Important Integration Points\n\n**Repo-Server gRPC Interface:**\n- Method: `GenerateManifest()` \n- Input: Source (repo URL, path, revision), AppProject constraints\n- Output: List of manifests (YAML), final revision SHA\n- Used by: `GetRepoObjs()` in state manager\n\n**GitOps Engine Integration:**\n- Package: `github.com/argoproj/gitops-engine`\n- Key functions:\n  - `sync.Reconcile()` - Match target & live objects\n  - `sync.Sync()` - Execute synchronization\n  - `diff.Diff()- Calculate differences\n  - Health evaluation functions\n\n**Live State Cache:**\n- In-memory cache of cluster state\n- Updated by deployment informers\n- Provides: live objects, health status, OpenAPI schema\n- Filtered by Application's resource tracking labels\n\n**Diff Cache:**\n- Stores diff results keyed by: app name + revision\n- Invalidated when: git revision changes\n- Used to avoid re-diffing unchanged apps\n- Can be disabled per-app via annotations\n\nThis comprehensive pipeline ensures Argo CD can:\n1. **Continuously monitor** application state (drift detection)\n2. **Compare declaratively** vs actual state (diff engine)\n3. **Reconcile safely** with respect to sync windows, RBAC, webhooks\n4. **Track progress** with detailed operation states\n5. **Support advanced patterns** (sync waves, pre/post hooks, pruning)",
      "type": "text"
    }
  ],
  "prompt": "Trace the complete Application sync pipeline from CRD to deployment:\n1. Find Application CRD definition - where are the types defined?\n2. Where does the Application controller start reconciliation?\n3. What are the main stages of the sync process?\n4. How does the controller interact with repo-server to get manifests?\n5. How does the controller diff and sync resources?\n6. What is the state machine during sync?\n7. Find key packages/files in the pipeline:\n   - CRD types (apis/application)\n   - Controller reconciliation loop (controller/appcontroller.go)\n   - State management (controller/state.go)\n   - Sync logic (controller/sync.go)\n   - Resource management (util/argo/*)\n   - Diff/normalizers (util/argo/diff)\n\nCreate a diagram showing the flow from CRD -> Controller -> RepoServer -> Diff -> Sync -> kubectl apply",
  "status": "completed",
  "totalDurationMs": 99829,
  "totalTokens": 62838,
  "totalToolUseCount": 39,

44\u2192)\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192// Application is a definition of Application resource.\n    47\u2192// +genclient\n    48\u2192// +genclient:noStatus\n    49\u2192// +k8s:deepcopy-gen:interfaces=k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime.Object\n    50\u2192// +kubebuilder:resource:path=applications,shortName=app;apps\n    51\u2192// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"Sync Status\",type=string,JSONPath=`.status.sync.status`\n    52\u2192// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"Health Status\",type=string,JSONPath=`.status.health.status`\n    53\u2192// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"Revision\",type=string,JSONPath=`.status.sync.revision`,priority=10\n    54\u2192// +kubebuilder:printcolumn:name=\"Project\",type=string,JSONPath=`.spec.project`,priority=10\n    55\u2192type Application struct {\n    56\u2192\tmetav1.TypeMeta   `json:\",inline\"`\n    57\u2192\tmetav1.ObjectMeta `json:\"metadata\" protobuf:\"bytes,1,opt,name=metadata\"`\n    58\u2192\tSpec              ApplicationSpec   `json:\"spec\" protobuf:\"bytes,2,opt,name=spec\"`\n    59\u2192\tStatus            ApplicationStatus `json:\"status,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,3,opt,name=status\"`\n    60\u2192\tOperation         *Operation        `json:\"operation,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,4,opt,name=operation\"`\n    61\u2192}\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192// ApplicationSpec represents desired application state. Contains link to repository with application definition and additional parameters link definition revision.\n    64\u2192type ApplicationSpec struct {\n    65\u2192\t// Source is a reference to the location of the application's manifests or chart\n    66\u2192\tSource *ApplicationSource `json:\"source,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,1,opt,name=source\"`\n    67\u2192\t// Destination is a reference to the target Kubernetes server and namespace\n    68\u2192\tDestination ApplicationDestination `json:\"destination\" protobuf:\"bytes,2,name=destination\"`\n    69\u2192\t// Project is a reference to the project this application belongs to.\n    70\u2192\t// The empty string means that application belongs to the 'default' project.\n    71\u2192\tProject string `json:\"project\" protobuf:\"bytes,3,name=project\"`\n    72\u2192\t// SyncPolicy controls when and how a sync will be performed\n    73\u2192\tSyncPolicy *SyncPolicy `json:\"syncPolicy,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,4,name=syncPolicy\"`\n    74\u2192\t// IgnoreDifferences is a list of resources and their fields which should be ignored during comparison\n    75\u2192\tIgnoreDifferences IgnoreDifferences `json:\"ignoreDifferences,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,5,name=ignoreDifferences\"`\n    76\u2192\t// Info contains a list of information (URLs, email addresses, and plain text) that relates to the application\n    77\u2192\tInfo []Info `json:\"info,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,6,name=info\"`\n    78\u2192\t// RevisionHistoryLimit limits the number of items kept in the application's revision history, which is used for informational purposes as well as for rollbacks to previous versions.\n    79\u2192\t// This should only be changed in exceptional circumstances.\n    80\u2192\t// Setting to zero will store no history. This will reduce storage used.\n    81\u2192\t// Increasing will increase the space used to store the history, so we do not recommend increasing it.\n    82\u2192\t// Default is 10.\n    83\u2192\tRevisionHistoryLimit *int64 `json:\"revisionHistoryLimit,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,7,name=revisionHistoryLimit\"`\n    84\u2192\n    85\u2192\t// Sources is a reference to the location of the application's manifests or chart\n    86\u2192\tSources ApplicationSources `json:\"sources,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,8,opt,name=sources\"`\n    87\u2192}\n    88\u2192\n    89\u2192type IgnoreDifferences []ResourceIgnoreDifferences\n    90\u2192\n    91\u2192func (id IgnoreDifferences) Equals(other IgnoreDifferences) bool {\n    92\u2192\treturn reflect.DeepEqual(id, other)\n    93\u2192}\n    94\u2192\n    95\u2192type TrackingMethod string\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192// ResourceIgnoreDifferences contains resource filter and list of json paths which should be ignored during comparison with live state.\n    98\u2192type ResourceIgnoreDifferences struct {\n    99\u2192\tGroup             string   `json:\"group,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,1,opt,name=group\"`\n   100\u2192\tKind              string   `json:\"kind\" protobuf:\"bytes,2,opt,name=kind\"`\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

207\u2192}\n   208\u2192\n   209\u2192// IsZero returns true if the application source is considered empty\n   210\u2192func (a ApplicationSources) IsZero() bool {\n   211\u2192\treturn len(a) == 0\n   212\u2192}\n   213\u2192\n   214\u2192func (a *ApplicationSpec) GetSource() ApplicationSource {\n   215\u2192\t// if Application has multiple sources, return the first source in sources\n   216\u2192\tif a.HasMultipleSources() {\n   217\u2192\t\treturn a.Sources[0]\n   218\u2192\t}\n   219\u2192\tif a.Source != nil {\n   220\u2192\t\treturn *a.Source\n   221\u2192\t}\n   222\u2192\treturn ApplicationSource{}\n   223\u2192}\n   224\u2192\n   225\u2192func (a *ApplicationSpec) GetSources() ApplicationSources {\n   226\u2192\tif a.HasMultipleSources() {\n   227\u2192\t\treturn a.Sources\n   228\u2192\t}\n   229\u2192\tif a.Source != nil {\n   230\u2192\t\treturn ApplicationSources{*a.Source}\n   231\u2192\t}\n   232\u2192\treturn ApplicationSources{}\n   233\u2192}\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192func (a *ApplicationSpec) HasMultipleSources() bool {\n   236\u2192\treturn len(a.Sources) > 0\n   237\u2192}\n   238\u2192\n   239\u2192func (a *ApplicationSpec) GetSourcePtrByPosition(sourcePosition int) *ApplicationSource {\n   240\u2192\t// if Application has multiple sources, return the first source in sources\n   241\u2192\treturn a.GetSourcePtrByIndex(sourcePosition - 1)\n   242\u2192}\n   243\u2192\n   244\u2192func (a *ApplicationSpec) GetSourcePtrByIndex(sourceIndex int) *ApplicationSource {\n   245\u2192\t// if Application has multiple sources, return the first source in sources\n   246\u2192\tif a.HasMultipleSources() {\n   247\u2192\t\tif sourceIndex > 0 {\n   248\u2192\t\t\treturn &a.Sources[sourceIndex]\n   249\u2192\t\t}\n   250\u2192\t\treturn &a.Sources[0]\n   251\u2192\t}\n   252\u2192\treturn a.Source\n   253\u2192}\n   254\u2192\n   255\u2192// AllowsConcurrentProcessing returns true if given application source can be processed concurrently\n   256\u2192func (a *ApplicationSource) AllowsConcurrentProcessing() bool {\n   257\u2192\tswitch {\n   258\u2192\t// Kustomize with parameters requires changing kustomization.yaml file\n   259\u2192\tcase a.Kustomize != nil:\n   260\u2192\t\treturn a.Kustomize.AllowsConcurrentProcessing()\n   261\u2192\t}\n   262\u2192\treturn true\n   263\u2192}\n   264\u2192\n   265\u2192// IsRef returns true when the application source is of type Ref\n   266\u2192func (a *ApplicationSource) IsRef() bool {\n   267\u2192\treturn a.Ref != \"\"\n   268\u2192}\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192// IsHelm returns true when the application source is of type Helm\n   271\u2192func (a *ApplicationSource) IsHelm() bool {\n   272\u2192\treturn a.Chart != \"\"\n   273\u2192}\n   274\u2192\n   275\u2192// IsHelmOci returns true when the application source is of type Helm OCI\n   276\u2192func (a *ApplicationSource) IsHelmOci() bool {\n   277\u2192\tif a.Chart == \"\" {\n   278\u2192\t\treturn false\n   279\u2192\t}\n   280\u2192\treturn helm.IsHelmOciRepo(a.RepoURL)\n   281\u2192}\n   282\u2192\n   283\u2192// IsZero returns true if the application source is considered empty\n   284\u2192func (a *ApplicationSource) IsZero() bool {\n   285\u2192\treturn a == nil ||\n   286\u2192\t\ta.RepoURL == \"\" &&\n   287\u2192\t\t\ta.Path == \"\" &&\n   288\u2192\t\t\ta.TargetRevision == \"\" &&\n   289\u2192\t\t\ta.Helm.IsZero() &&\n   290\u2192\t\t\ta.Kustomize.IsZero() &&\n   291\u2192\t\t\ta.Directory.IsZero() &&\n   292\u2192\t\t\ta.Plugin.IsZero()\n   293\u2192}\n   294\u2192\n   295\u2192// GetNamespaceOrDefault gets the static namespace configured in the source. If none is configured, returns the given\n   296\u2192// default.\n   297\u2192func (a *ApplicationSource) GetNamespaceOrDefault(defaultNamespace string) string {\n   298\u2192\tif a == nil {\n   299\u2192\t\treturn defaultNamespace\n   300\u2192\t}\n   301\u2192\tif a.Helm != nil && a.Helm.Namespace != \"\" {\n   302\u2192\t\treturn a.Helm.Namespace\n   303\u2192\t}\n   304\u2192\tif a.Kustomize != nil && a.Kustomize.Namespace != \"\" {\n   305\u2192\t\treturn a.Kustomize.Namespace\n   306\u2192\t}\n   307\u2192\treturn defaultNamespace\n   308\u2192}\n   309\u2192\n   310\u2192// GetKubeVersionOrDefault gets the static Kubernetes API version configured in the source. If none is configured,\n   311\u2192// returns the given default.\n   312\u2192func (a *ApplicationSource) GetKubeVersionOrDefault(defaultKubeVersion string) string {\n   313\u2192\tif a == nil {\n   314\u2192\t\treturn defaultKubeVersion\n   315\u2192\t}\n   316\u2192\tif a.Helm != nil && a.Helm.KubeVersion != \"\" {\n   317\u2192\t\treturn a.Helm.KubeVersion\n   318\u2192\t}\n   319\u2192\tif a.Kustomize != nil && a.Kustomize.KubeVersion != \"\" {\n   320\u2192\t\treturn a.Kustomize.KubeVersion\n   321\u2192\t}\n   322\u2192\treturn defaultKubeVersion\n   323\u2192}\n   324\u2192\n   325\u2192// GetAPIVersionsOrDefault gets the static API versions list configured in the source. If none is configured, returns\n   326\u2192// the given default.\n   327\u2192func (a *ApplicationSource) GetAPIVersionsOrDefault(defaultAPIVersions []string) []string {\n   328\u2192\tif a == nil {\n   329\u2192\t\treturn defaultAPIVersions\n   330\u2192\t}\n   331\u2192\tif a.Helm != nil && len(a.Helm.APIVersions) > 0 {\n   332\u2192\t\treturn a.Helm.APIVersions\n   333\u2192\t}\n   334\u2192\tif a.Kustomize != nil && len(a.Kustomize.APIVersions) > 0 {\n   335\u2192\t\treturn a.Kustomize.APIVersions\n   336\u2192\t}\n   337\u2192\treturn defaultAPIVersions\n   338\u2192}\n   339\u2192\n   340\u2192// ApplicationSourceType specifies the type of the application's source\n   341\u2192type ApplicationSourceType string\n   342\u2192\n   343\u2192const (\n   344\u2192\tApplicationSourceTypeHelm      ApplicationSourceType = \"Helm\"\n   345\u2192\tApplicationSourceTypeKustomize ApplicationSourceType = \"Kustomize\"\n   346\u2192\tApplicationSourceTypeDirectory ApplicationSourceType = \"Directory\"\n   347\u2192\tApplicationSourceTypePlugin    ApplicationSourceType = \"Plugin\"\n   348\u2192)\n   349\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

"  1016\u2192type ApplicationStatus struct {\n  1017\u2192\t// Resources is a list of Kubernetes resources managed by this application\n  1018\u2192\tResources []ResourceStatus `json:\"resources,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,1,opt,name=resources\"`\n  1019\u2192\t// Sync contains information about the application's current sync status\n  1020\u2192\tSync SyncStatus `json:\"sync,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,2,opt,name=sync\"`\n  1021\u2192\t// Health contains information about the application's current health status\n  1022\u2192\tHealth HealthStatus `json:\"health,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,3,opt,name=health\"`\n  1023\u2192\t// History contains information about the application's sync history\n  1024\u2192\tHistory RevisionHistories `json:\"history,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,4,opt,name=history\"`\n  1025\u2192\t// Conditions is a list of currently observed application conditions\n  1026\u2192\tConditions []ApplicationCondition `json:\"conditions,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,5,opt,name=conditions\"`\n  1027\u2192\t// ReconciledAt indicates when the application state was reconciled using the latest git version\n  1028\u2192\tReconciledAt *metav1.Time `json:\"reconciledAt,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,6,opt,name=reconciledAt\"`\n  1029\u2192\t// OperationState contains information about any ongoing operations, such as a sync\n  1030\u2192\tOperationState *OperationState `json:\"operationState,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,7,opt,name=operationState\"`\n  1031\u2192\t// ObservedAt indicates when the application state was updated without querying latest git state\n  1032\u2192\t// Deprecated: controller no longer updates ObservedAt field\n  1033\u2192\tObservedAt *metav1.Time `json:\"observedAt,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,8,opt,name=observedAt\"`\n  1034\u2192\t// SourceType specifies the type of this application\n  1035\u2192\tSourceType ApplicationSourceType `json:\"sourceType,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,9,opt,name=sourceType\"`\n  1036\u2192\t// Summary contains a list of URLs and container images used by this application\n  1037\u2192\tSummary ApplicationSummary `json:\"summary,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,10,opt,name=summary\"`\n  1038\u2192\t// ResourceHealthSource indicates where the resource health status is stored: inline if not set or appTree\n  1039\u2192\tResourceHealthSource ResourceHealthLocation `json:\"resourceHealthSource,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,11,opt,name=resourceHealthSource\"`\n  1040\u2192\t// SourceTypes specifies the type of the sources included in the application\n  1041\u2192\tSourceTypes []ApplicationSourceType `json:\"sourceTypes,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,12,opt,name=sourceTypes\"`\n  1042\u2192\t// ControllerNamespace indicates the namespace in which the application controller is located\n  1043\u2192\tControllerNamespace string `json:\"controllerNamespace,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,13,opt,name=controllerNamespace\"`\n  1044\u2192}\n  1045\u2192\n  1046\u2192// GetRevisions will return the current revision associated with the Application.\n  1047\u2192// If app has multisources, it will return all corresponding revisions preserving\n  1048\u2192// order from the app.spec.sources. If app has only one source, it will return a\n  1049\u2192// single revision in the list.\n  1050\u2192func (a *ApplicationStatus) GetRevisions() []string {\n  1051\u2192\trevisions := []string{}\n  1052\u2192\tif len(a.Sync.Revisions) > 0 {\n  1053\u2192\t\trevisions = a.Sync.Revisions\n  1054\u2192\t} else if a.Sync.Revision != \"\" {\n  1055\u2192\t\trevisions = append(revisions, a.Sync.Revision)\n  1056\u2192\t}\n  1057\u2192\treturn revisions\n  1058\u2192}\n  1059\u2192\n  1060\u2192// BuildComparedToStatus will build a ComparedTo object based on the current\n  1061\u2192// Application state.\n  1062\u2192func (spec *ApplicationSpec) BuildComparedToStatus() ComparedTo {\n  1063\u2192\tct := ComparedTo{\n  1064\u2192\t\tDestination:       spec.Destination,\n  1065\u2192\t\tIgnoreDifferences: spec.IgnoreDifferences,\n  1066\u2192\t}\n  1067\u2192\tif spec.HasMultipleSources() {\n  1068\u2192\t\tct.Sources = spec.Sources\n  1069\u2192\t} else {\n  1070\u2192\t\tct.Source = spec.GetSource()\n  1071\u2192\t}\n  1072\u2192\treturn ct\n  1073\u2192}\n  1074\u2192\n  1075\u2192// JWTTokens represents a list of JWT tokens\n  1076\u2192type JWTTokens struct {\n  1077\u2192\tItems []JWTToken `json:\"items,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,1,opt,name=items\"`\n  1078\u2192}\n  1079\u2192\n  1080\u2192// OperationInitiator contains information about the initiator of an operation\n  1081\u2192type OperationInitiator struct {\n  1082\u2192\t// Username contains the name of a user who started operation\n  1083\u2192\tUsername string `json:\"username,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,1,opt,name=username\"`\n  1084\u2192\t// Automated is set to true if operation was initiated automatically by the application controller.\n  1085\u2192\tAutomated bool `json:\"automated,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,2,opt,name=automated\"`\n  1086\u2192}\n  1087\u2192\n  1088\u2192// Operation contains information about a requested or running operation\n  1089\u2192type Operation struct {\n  1090\u2192\t// Sync contains parameters for the operation\n  1091\u2192\tSync *SyncOperation `json:\"sync,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,1,opt,name=sync\"`\n  1092\u2192\t// InitiatedBy contains information about who initiated the operations\n  1093\u2192\tInitiatedBy OperationInitiator `json:\"initiatedBy,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,2,opt,name=initiatedBy\"`\n  1094\u2192\t// Info is a list of informational items for this operation\n  1095\u2192\tInfo []*Info `json:\"info,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,3,name=info\"`\n  1096\u2192\t// Retry controls the strategy to apply if a sync fails\n  1097\u2192\tRetry RetryStrategy `json:\"retry,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,4,opt,name=retry\"`\n  1098\u2192}\n  1099\u2192\n  1100\u2192// DryRun returns true if an operation was requested to be performed in dry run mode\n  1101\u2192func (o *Operation) DryRun() bool {\n  1102\u2192\tif o.Sync != nil {\n  1103\u2192\t\treturn o.Sync.DryRun\n  1104\u2192\t}\n  1105\u2192\treturn false\n  1106\u2192}\n  1107\u2192\n  1108\u2192// SyncOperationResource contains resources to sync.\n  1109\u2192type SyncOperationResource struct {\n  1110\u2192\tGroup     string `json:\"group,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,1,opt,name=group\"`\n  1111\u2192\tKind      string `json:\"kind\" protobuf:\"bytes,2,opt,name=kind\"`\n  1112\u2192\tName      string `json:\"name\" protobuf:\"bytes,3,opt,name=name\"`\n  1113\u2192\tNamespace string `json:\"namespace,omitempty\" protobuf:\"bytes,4,opt,name=namespace\"`\n  1114\u2192\t// nolint:govet\n  1115\u2192\tExclude bool `json:\"-\"`\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"

\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/pkg/client/listers/application/v1alpha1\"\n    54\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/reposerver/apiclient\"\n    55\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/argo\"\n    56\u2192\targodiff \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/argo/diff\"\n    57\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/argo/normalizers\"\n    58\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/env\"\n    59\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/stats\"\n    60\u2192\n    61\u2192\tkubeerrors \"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors\"\n    62\u2192\n    63\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/pkg/ratelimiter\"\n    64\u2192\tappstatecache \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/cache/appstate\"\n    65\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/db\"\n    66\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/errors\"\n    67\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/glob\"\n    68\u2192\t\"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/helm\"\n    69\u2192\tlogutils \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/log\"\n    70\u2192\tsettings_util \"github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/v2/util/settings\"\n    71\u2192)\n    72\u2192\n    73\u2192const (\n    74\u2192\tupdateOperationStateTimeout             = 1 * time.Second\n    75\u2192\tdefaultDeploymentInformerResyncDuration = 10 * time.Second\n    76\u2192\t// orphanedIndex contains application which monitor orphaned resources by namespace\n    77\u2192\torphanedIndex = \"orphaned\"\n    78\u2192)\n    79\u2192\n    80\u2192type CompareWith int\n    81\u2192\n    82\u2192const (\n    83\u2192\t// Compare live application state against state defined in latest git revision with no resolved revision caching.\n    84\u2192\tCompareWithLatestForceResolve CompareWith = 3\n    85\u2192\t// Compare live application state against state defined in latest git revision.\n    86\u2192\tCompareWithLatest CompareWith = 2\n    87\u2192\t// Compare live application state against state defined using revision of most recent comparison.\n    88\u2192\tCompareWithRecent CompareWith = 1\n    89\u2192\t// Skip comparison and only refresh application resources tree\n    90\u2192\tComparisonWithNothing CompareWith = 0\n    91\u2192)\n    92\u2192\n    93\u2192func (a CompareWith) Max(b CompareWith) CompareWith {\n    94\u2192\treturn CompareWith(math.Max(float64(a), float64(b)))\n    95\u2192}\n    96\u2192\n    97\u2192func (a CompareWith) Pointer() *CompareWith {\n    98\u2192\treturn &a\n    99\u2192}\n   100\u2192\n   101\u2192func getAppLog(app *appv1.Application) *log.Entry {\n   102\u2192\treturn log.WithFields(log.Fields{\n   103\u2192\t\t\"application\":        app.Name,\n   104\u2192\t\t\"app-namespace\":      app.Namespace,\n   105\u2192\t\t\"app-qualified-name\": app.QualifiedName(),\n   106\u2192\t\t\"project\":            app.Spec.Project,\n   107\u2192\t})\n   108\u2192}\n   109\u2192\n   110\u2192// ApplicationController is the controller for application resources.\n   111\u2192type ApplicationController struct {\n   112\u2192\tcache                *appstatecache.Cache\n   113\u2192\tnamespace            string\n   114\u2192\tkubeClientset        kubernetes.Interface\n   115\u2192\tkubectl              kube.Kubectl\n   116\u2192\tapplicationClientset appclientset.Interface\n   117\u2192\tauditLogger          *argo.AuditLogger\n   118\u2192\t// queue contains app namespace/name\n   119\u2192\tappRefreshQueue workqueue.TypedRateLimitingInterface[string]\n   120\u2192\t// queue contains app namespace/name/comparisonType and used to request app refresh with the predefined comparison type\n   121\u2192\tappComparisonTypeRefreshQueue workqueue.TypedRateLimitingInterface[string]\n   122\u2192\tappOperationQueue             workqueue.TypedRateLimitingInterface[string]\n   123\u2192\tprojectRefreshQueue           workqueue.TypedRateLimitingInterface[string]\n   124\u2192\tappInformer                   cache.SharedIndexInformer\n   125\u2192\tappLister                     applisters.ApplicationLister\n   126\u2192\tprojInformer                  cache.SharedIndexInformer\n   127\u2192\tappStateManager               AppStateManager\n   128\u2192\tstateCache                    statecache.LiveStateCache\n   129\u2192\tstatusRefreshTimeout          time.Duration\n   130\u2192\tstatusHardRefreshTimeout      time.Duration\n   131\u2192\tstatusRefreshJitter           time.Duration\n   132\u2192\tselfHealTimeout               time.Duration\n   133\u2192\tselfHealBackOff               *wait.Backoff\n   134\u2192\trepoClientset                 apiclient.Clientset\n   135\u2192\tdb                            db.ArgoDB\n   136\u2192\tsettingsMgr                   *settings_util.SettingsManager\n   137\u2192\trefreshRequestedApps          map[string]CompareWith\n   138\u2192\trefreshRequestedAppsMutex     *sync.Mutex\n   139\u2192\tmetricsServer                 *metrics.MetricsServer\n   140\u2192\tkubectlSemaphore              *semaphore.Weighted\n   141\u2192\tclusterSharding               sharding.ClusterShardingCache\n   142\u2192\tprojByNameCache               sync.Map\n   143\u2192\tapplicationNamespaces         []string\n   144\u2192\tignoreNormalizerOpts          normalizers.IgnoreNormalizerOpts\n   145\u2192\n   146\u2192\t// dynamicClusterDistributionEnabled if disabled deploymentInformer is never initialized\n   147\u2192\tdynamicClusterDistributionEnabled bool\n   148\u2192\tdeploymentInformer                informerv1.DeploymentInformer\n   149\u2192}\n   150\u2192\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. See https://github.com/argoproj/argo-cd/issues/18500.\n  1556\u2192\t\tctrl.appOperationQueue.AddRateLimited(appKey)\n  1557\u2192\t\tctrl.appRefreshQueue.Done(appKey)\n  1558\u2192\t}()\n
