17. $ find /workspace -maxdepth 2 -name "*.go" -type f | grep -v vendor | grep -v ".git" | wc -l
18. $ cat /workspace/VERSION
19. $ find /workspace -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "*.md" | xargs ls -lh
20. $ ls -la /workspace/cmd/argocd/commands/ | head -30
21. $ find /workspace/cmpserver -maxdepth 2 -type d | sort
22. $ find /workspace/applicationset -maxdepth 2 -type d | sort
23. $ ls -la /workspace/ | grep -E "^d"
24. $ find /workspace -type f -name "*.go" | grep -E "(cmd|server|controller|reposerver|applicationset)" | head -20
25. $ find /workspace -type f -name "application*.go" | grep -E "controller/.*\.go$" | head -5
26. $ find /workspace/controller -type f -name "*.go" | grep -v test | head -10
27. $ grep -n "func.*Run\|func.*NewApplicationController" /workspace/controller/appcontroller.go | head -20
28. $ grep -n "func.*Run\|func.*Listen\|func.*Init\|func.*NewServer" /workspace/server/server.go | head -20
29. $ grep -n "func.*CreateGRPC" /workspace/reposerver/server.go
30. $ find /workspace/applicationset -type f -name "*.go" | grep -E "controller|reconcil" | head -10
31. $ grep -n "func.*SetupWithManager\|type ApplicationSetReconciler" /workspace/applicationset/controllers/applicationset_controller.go | head -10
32. $ find /workspace -type f -name "*.go" | grep -E "(settings|config)" | head -20
33. $ grep -r "argocd-cm\|argocd-secret" /workspace/util/settings/ --include="*.go" | head -20
34. $ wc -l /workspace/util/settings/settings.go
35. $ grep -n "func NewSettingsManager" /workspace/util/settings/settings.go
36. $ grep -n "func (mgr \*SettingsManager) GetSettings" /workspace/util/settings/settings.go
37. $ grep -n "func (mgr \*SettingsManager) updateSettingsFromSecret" /workspace/util/settings/settings.go
38. $ grep -n "AddKubectlFlagsToCmd" /workspace/util/cli/cli.go | head -5
39. $ grep -n "ArgoCDConfigMapName\|ArgoCDSecretName" /workspace/common/common.go
40. $ grep -n "EnvAppConfigPath\|ARGOCD_" /workspace/common/common.go | head -30
41. $ find /workspace -type d -name "test" -o -type d -name "tests" -o -type d -name "testdata" -o -type d -name "fixtures" | head -30
42. $ ls -la /workspace/test/ 2>/dev/null | head -50
43. $ find /workspace -type f -name "*_test.go" | head -20
44. $ find /workspace -type f -name "*_test.go" | wc -l
45. $ grep -r "\"testing\"" /workspace --include="*_test.go" | head -5
46. $ grep -r "testify\|ginkgo\|stretchr/testify" /workspace --include="*.go" | head -10
47. $ ls -la /workspace/test/e2e/ | head -30
48. $ ls -la /workspace/test/e2e/ | tail -30
49. $ grep -r "mockgen\|mock\|Mock" /workspace --include="*.go" | grep -i "//go:generate" | head -20
50. $ grep -r "//go:generate" /workspace --include="*.go" | head -20
51. $ find /workspace -path "*/mocks/*.go" | head -20
52. $ ls -la /workspace/test/fixture/
53. $ ls -la /workspace/test/e2e/fixture/ | head -30
54. $ ls -la /workspace/test/e2e/testdata/ | head -30
55. $ ls -la /workspace/test/e2e/fixture/app/
56. $ find /workspace -path "*/testdata/*.yaml" -o -path "*/testdata/*.yml" -o -path "*/testdata/*.json" | head -20
57. $ find /workspace -name "Makefile" | head -3
58. $ grep -i "mock\|testify" /workspace/Makefile | head -20
59. $ find /workspace/server -name "*_test.go" -type f | head -10
60. $ ls -la /workspace/test/e2e/testdata2/ | head -20
61. $ grep -r "t.Run\|t.Parallel" /workspace --include="*_test.go" | head -20
62. $ tree -L 2 /workspace/test/ -d
63. $ find /workspace/test -type d | sort
64. $ grep "testify\|mockery" /workspace/go.mod | head -10
65. $ grep "mockery" /workspace/go.mod
66. $ grep -i "mockery" /workspace/go.sum | head -3
67. $ wc -l /workspace/test/e2e/*_test.go | tail -1
68. $ head -50 /workspace/test/e2e/app_management_ns_test.go
69. $ find /workspace -type f -name "*.go" | grep -E "(application|controller)" | head -20
70. $ find /workspace -type d -name "apis" -o -type d -name "argoproj" | head -10
71. $ ls -la /workspace/pkg/apis/
72. $ ls -la /workspace/pkg/apis/application/
73. $ ls -la /workspace/pkg/apis/application/v1alpha1/
74. $ ls -la /workspace/controller/ | head -20
75. $ find /workspace -type d -name "util" -o -type d -name "diff" | grep -E "(util|argo)" | head -10
76. $ ls -la /workspace/util/argo/
77. $ ls -la /workspace/util/argo/diff/
78. $ grep -n "func (ac \*ApplicationController)" /workspace/controller/appcontroller.go | head -20
79. $ grep -n "func (ac" /workspace/controller/appcontroller.go | head -20
80. $ grep -n "func (" /workspace/controller/appcontroller.go | head -30
81. $ grep -n "processAppRefreshQueueItem\|processAppOperationQueueItem" /workspace/controller/appcontroller.go | head -10
82. $ grep -n "func.*Reconcile\|func.*Compare\|func.*Sync" /workspace/util/argo/argo.go | head -20
83. $ grep -n "Reconcile\|reconcile" /workspace/controller/state.go | head -20
84. $ find /workspace -path "*reposerver/apiclient*" -type f -name "*.go" | head -10
85. $ ls -la /workspace/util/argo/normalizers/
86. $ grep -r "argoproj/gitops-engine" /workspace/go.mod | head -5
87. $ grep -n "type SyncStatus struct\|type OperationState struct\|type SyncResult struct" /workspace/pkg/apis/application/v1alpha1/types.go
